_**User (2026-03-12 07:57:09Z)**_

Implement the following plan:

# Plan: Database-Backed Action Board

## Context
The Action Board (Your Court / Our Court) currently uses hardcoded items. We need to make it database-driven so admins can add/edit/delete/hide/check-off items. Portal is read-only for clients with a "Show completed" toggle.

## Files to Modify
1. **Supabase** — new `client_action_items` table (via MCP migration tool)
2. **`app/clients/page.tsx`** — type, state, CRUD handlers, Action Board tab in Context modal
3. **`app/public/portal/[id]/page.tsx`** — fetch from DB, replace hardcoded items, add show completed toggle

---

## Step 1: Migration — `client_action_items` table

Columns: `id` (uuid PK), `client_id` (FK → clients), `text` (text), `court` ('yours'|'ours'), `phase` ('kickoff'|'discovery'|'tracker'), `is_done` (bool default false), `is_hidden` (bool default false), `display_order` (int default 0), `created_at`, `updated_at`.

RLS: authenticated full CRUD, anon SELECT only (same as `client_meeting_notes`).

---

## Step 2: Admin — Type + State + Fetch/Refresh + Seed + CRUD

**Type:** `ActionItem` with all columns.

**State** (follows `Record<clientId, T[]>` pattern like decision logs):
- `clientActionItems`, `actionItemForm`, `editingActionItemId`, `isActionItemFormOpen`, `deletingActionItemId`

**Refresh:** `refreshActionItems()` — fetch all, group by client_id. Called in initial data load.

**Seed:** `seedActionItems(clientId)` — if client has 0 items, insert the default set (the current hardcoded items across all 3 phases). Called when admin switches to Action Board tab.

**CRUD handlers:**
- `handleActionItemSubmit()` — create/update (branches on `editingActionItemId`)
- `toggleActionItemDone(item)` — flip `is_done`
- `toggleActionItemHidden(item)` — flip `is_hidden`
- `deleteActionItem(id)` — two-step inline delete confirmation

---

## Step 3: Admin — Convert Context Modal to Tabs

Wrap existing Context modal content in `<Tabs>`:
- **Tab 1: "Context"** — existing engagement type, onboarding phase, scope, dates, contacts, URLs + Save button
- **Tab 2: "Action Board"** — new UI

On switching to Action Board tab → trigger `seedActionItems()`.

---

## Step 4: Admin — Action Board Tab UI

Phase sub-tabs: `Kickoff | Discovery | Tracker`

For each phase, items grouped into "Your Court" and "Our Court" sections:
- Checkbox to toggle `is_done`
- Text (strikethrough if done)
- Eye/EyeOff icon to toggle `is_hidden` (hidden items shown at reduced opacity)
- Edit (Pencil) → opens inline form
- Delete (Trash2) → inline confirmation
- "+ Add Item" → inline form: text input + court select (phase locked to current tab)

---

## Step 5: Portal — Fetch from DB + Show Completed Toggle

**New state:** `actionItems: ActionItem[]`, `showCompleted: boolean`

**Fetch:** `fetchActionItems()` — `supabasePublic.from('client_action_items').select(...).eq('client_id', clientId).eq('is_hidden', false)` (hidden items never reach portal).

**Display logic:**
- Filter by current `portalPhase` + `showCompleted` toggle
- **Fallback:** if no DB items, show current hardcoded defaults (backward compat for un-seeded clients)
- "Show completed" / "Hide completed" toggle above the action board (only visible when done items exist)

---

## Verification
1. Open Context modal → Action Board tab → defaults seeded for all 3 phases
2. Add/edit/delete/hide/check items → changes persist across page reloads
3. Portal shows only non-hidden items for current phase, read-only
4. "Show completed" toggle reveals/hides done items in portal
5. Client with no seeded items still sees hardcoded fallback in portal


If you need specific details from before exiting plan mode (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: /Users/andylee/.claude/projects/-Users-andylee-Downloads-KOL-Campaign-Manager/e506fcdc-c9bd-4da5-aac7-852adb5e5257.jsonl

---

   190→  const [startClientStep, setStartClientStep] = useState(0);
   191→  // Update the step order so onboarding comes before campaign details
   192→  const startClientSections = [
   193→    'Client Details',
   194→    'Onboarding',
   195→    'Campaign Details',
   196→    'Contracting Status',
   197→    'Support & Follow-Up'

   199→  const isValidEmail = (email: string) => {
   200→    return /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(email);
   201→  };
   202→  const isStepValid = () => {
   203→    if (startClientStep === 0) {
   204→      if (startClientForm.isRenewingClient) {
   205→        return !!startClientForm.selectedExistingClient;
   206→      } else {
   207→        return (
   208→          !!startClientForm.companyName.trim() &&
   209→          !!startClientForm.email.trim() &&
   210→          isValidEmail(startClientForm.email) &&
   211→          !!startClientForm.source
   212→        );
   213→      }
   214→    }
   215→    if (startClientStep === 1) {
   216→      // Onboarding step: only require call date if callHeld is checked
   217→      if (startClientForm.callHeld) {
   218→        return !!startClientForm.callDate;
   219→      }
   220→      return true;
   221→    }
   222→    if (startClientStep === 2) {
   223→      // Campaign Details step: require all campaign fields except end date
   224→      return (
   225→        !!startClientForm.campaignName.trim() &&
   226→        !!startClientForm.campaignManager &&
   227→        !!startClientForm.startDate &&
   228→        !!startClientForm.region &&
   229→        !!startClientForm.totalBudget
   230→      );
   231→    }
   232→    return true;
   233→  };
   234→
   235→  const openSharePortal = async (client: ClientWithAccess) => {
   236→    setClientToShare(client);
   237→    setShareExtraForms([]);
   238→    setShareAddFormOpen(false);
   239→    setIsSharePortalOpen(true);
   240→    try {
   241→      const forms = await FormService.getAllForms();
   242→      setShareForms(forms.filter(f => f.status === 'published'));
   243→    } catch (err) {
   244→      console.error('Error fetching forms:', err);
   245→    }
   246→  };
   247→
   248→  const copyPortalLink = () => {
   249→    if (!clientToShare) return;
   250→    const portalUrl = `${window.location.origin}/public/portal/${clientToShare.slug || clientToShare.id}`;
   251→    navigator.clipboard.writeText(portalUrl);
   252→    toast({
   253→      title: 'Link Copied',
   254→      description: 'Portal link has been copied to clipboard',
   255→    });
   256→  };
   257→
   258→  const ONBOARDING_FORM_SLUG = 'holo-hive-onboarding';
   259→
   260→  const getFormUrl = (formSlugOrId: string) => {
   261→    if (!clientToShare) return '';
   262→    return `${typeof window !== 'undefined' ? window.location.origin : ''}/public/forms/${formSlugOrId}?client=${clientToShare.id}`;
   263→  };
   264→
   265→  const copyFormLink = (formSlugOrId: string, formName: string) => {
   266→    const url = getFormUrl(formSlugOrId);
   267→    if (!url) return;
   268→    navigator.clipboard.writeText(url);
   269→    toast({
   270→      title: 'Link Copied',
   271→      description: `${formName} link has been copied to clipboard`,
   272→    });
   273→  };
   274→
   275→  const [isStartClientSubmitting, setIsStartClientSubmitting] = useState(false);
   276→  const [startClientError, setStartClientError] = useState<string | null>(null);
   277→  useEffect(() => {
   278→    fetchClients();
   279→    if (userProfile?.role === 'admin' || userProfile?.role === 'super_admin') {
   280→      UserService.getAllUsers().then(setAllUsers);
   281→    }
   282→    fetchPartners();
   283→  }, [user?.id, userProfile?.role]);
   284→
   285→  // Handle partner filtering
   286→  useEffect(() => {
   287→    if (partnerIdParam) {
   288→      const partner = allPartners.find(p => p.id === partnerIdParam);
   289→      setFilteredPartnerName(partner?.name || null);
   290→    } else {
   291→      setFilteredPartnerName(null);
   292→    }
   293→  }, [partnerIdParam, allPartners]);
   294→  const fetchPartners = async () => {
   295→    try {
   296→      const { data, error } = await supabase
   297→        .from('partners')
   298→        .select('id, name')
   299→        .eq('is_active', true)
   300→        .order('name');
   301→
   302→      if (error) throw error;
   303→      setAllPartners(data || []);
   304→    } catch (err) {
   305→      console.error('Error fetching partners:', err);
   306→    }
   307→  };
   308→
   309→  const fetchClients = async () => {
   310→    if (!user?.id || !userProfile?.role) return;
   311→    try {
   312→      setLoading(true);
   313→      setError(null);
   314→      const fetchedClients = await ClientService.getClientsForUser(
   315→        userProfile.role as 'admin' | 'member' | 'client',
   316→        user.id
   317→      );
   318→
   319→      setClients(fetchedClients);
   320→      // Fetch campaigns for all clients and compute status breakdown
   321→      const clientIds = fetchedClients.map(c => c.id);
   322→      const allCampaigns: any[] = await CampaignService.getCampaignsByClientIds(clientIds);
   323→      const statusMap: Record<string, Record<CampaignStatus, number>> = {};
   324→      for (const client of fetchedClients) {
   325→        statusMap[client.id] = { Planning: 0, Active: 0, Paused: 0, Completed: 0 };
   326→      }
   327→      for (const campaign of allCampaigns) {
   328→        if (statusMap[campaign.client_id]) {
   329→          statusMap[campaign.client_id][campaign.status as CampaignStatus]++;
   330→        }
   331→      }
   332→      setClientsWithStatus(
   333→        fetchedClients.map(client => ({
   334→          ...client,
   335→          campaignsByStatus: statusMap[client.id],
   336→        }))
   337→      );
   338→
   339→      // Fetch linked accounts (opportunities with client_id)
   340→      const allOpportunities = await CRMService.getAllOpportunities();
   341→      const accountsMap: Record<string, CRMOpportunity[]> = {};
   342→      for (const opp of allOpportunities) {
   343→        if (opp.client_id) {
   344→          if (!accountsMap[opp.client_id]) {
   345→            accountsMap[opp.client_id] = [];
   346→          }
   347→          accountsMap[opp.client_id].push(opp);
   348→        }
   349→      }

   393→  const refreshMeetingNotes = async () => {

   650→    const crmStartDate = crmAccount?.closed_at || crmAccount?.qualified_at || crmAccount?.created_at;
   651→
   652→    setContextModalClient(client);
   653→    setContextForm({
   654→      engagement_type: ctx?.engagement_type || '',
   655→      scope: crmAccount ? crmScope : (ctx?.scope || ''),
   656→      start_date: crmAccount && crmStartDate
   657→        ? new Date(crmStartDate)
   658→        : (ctx?.start_date ? new Date(ctx.start_date + 'T00:00:00') : undefined),
   659→      milestones: ctx?.milestones || '',
   660→      client_contacts: ctx?.client_contacts || '',
   661→      holohive_contacts: ctx?.holohive_contacts || '',
   662→      telegram_url: (ctx as any)?.telegram_url || '',
   663→      shared_drive_url: (ctx as any)?.shared_drive_url || '',
   664→      gtm_sync_url: (ctx as any)?.gtm_sync_url || '',
   665→      onboarding_phase: (ctx as any)?.onboarding_phase || '',
   666→    });
   667→  };
   668→
   669→  const handleContextSubmit = async () => {
   670→    if (!contextModalClient) return;
   671→    const existing = clientContexts[contextModalClient.id];
   672→    const payload = {
   673→      client_id: contextModalClient.id,
   674→      engagement_type: contextForm.engagement_type || null,
   675→      scope: contextForm.scope || null,
   676→      start_date: contextForm.start_date ? contextForm.start_date.toISOString().split('T')[0] : null,
   677→      milestones: contextForm.milestones || null,
   678→      client_contacts: contextForm.client_contacts || null,
   679→      holohive_contacts: contextForm.holohive_contacts || null,
   680→      telegram_url: contextForm.telegram_url || null,
   681→      shared_drive_url: contextForm.shared_drive_url || null,
   682→      gtm_sync_url: contextForm.gtm_sync_url || null,
   683→      onboarding_phase: contextForm.onboarding_phase || null,
   684→      updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   685→    };
   686→    try {
   687→      if (existing) {
   688→        await supabase.from('client_context').update(payload).eq('id', existing.id);
   689→      } else {
   690→        await supabase.from('client_context').insert(payload);
   691→      }
   692→      await refreshClientContexts();
   693→      setContextModalClient(null);
   694→    } catch (err) {
   695→      console.error('Error saving context:', err);
   696→    }
   697→  };
   698→
   699→  // Decision log CRUD
   700→  const handleDecisionSubmit = async () => {
   701→    if (!meetingNotesModalClient || !decisionForm.summary.trim() || !decisionForm.decision_date) return;
   702→    const decDateStr = decisionForm.decision_date.toISOString().split('T')[0];
   703→    try {
   704→      if (editingDecisionId) {
   705→        await supabase.from('client_decision_log').update({
   706→          decision_date: decDateStr,
   707→          summary: decisionForm.summary.trim(),
   708→        }).eq('id', editingDecisionId);
   709→      } else {
   710→        await supabase.from('client_decision_log').insert({
   711→          client_id: meetingNotesModalClient.id,
   712→          decision_date: decDateStr,
   713→          summary: decisionForm.summary.trim(),
   714→          created_by: user?.id,
   715→        });
   716→      }
   717→      await refreshDecisionLogs();
   718→      setIsDecisionFormOpen(false);
   719→      setEditingDecisionId(null);
   720→      setDecisionForm({ decision_date: undefined, summary: '' });
   721→    } catch (err) {
   722→      console.error('Error saving decision:', err);
   723→    }
   724→  };
   725→
   726→  const deleteDecision = async (id: string) => {
   727→    await supabase.from('client_decision_log').delete().eq('id', id);
   728→    await refreshDecisionLogs();
   729→    setDeletingDecisionId(null);
```

All done. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

**Step 1 — Migration:** Created `client_action_items` table with `id`, `client_id` (FK), `text`, `court` (yours/ours), `phase` (kickoff/discovery/tracker), `is_done`, `is_hidden`, `display_order`, `created_at`, `updated_at`. RLS: authenticated full CRUD, anon SELECT only.

**Steps 2-4 — Admin (`app/clients/page.tsx`):**
- Added `ActionItem` type and state variables (`clientActionItems`, `actionItemForm`, `editingActionItemId`, `isActionItemFormOpen`, `deletingActionItemId`, `contextModalTab`, `actionBoardPhase`)
- Added `refreshActionItems()`, `seedActionItems()` (inserts 14 default items across 3 phases), and CRUD handlers (`handleActionItemSubmit`, `toggleActionItemDone`, `toggleActionItemHidden`, `deleteActionItem`)
- Fetches action items in initial data load
- Converted Context modal to tabbed layout: **Context** tab (existing fields + Save) and **Action Board** tab
- Action Board has phase sub-tabs (Kickoff/Discovery/Tracker), items grouped by Your Court / Our Court
- Each item has: checkbox, text, eye toggle for visibility, edit pencil, delete with inline confirmation
- "+ Add Item" inline form with text input + court select

**Step 5 — Portal (`app/public/portal/[id]/page.tsx`):**
- Added `actionItems` and `showCompleted` state
- Added `fetchActionItems()` that queries DB filtering `is_hidden = false`
- Falls back to hardcoded defaults for un-seeded clients
- Filters by current `portalPhase` and `showCompleted` toggle
- "Show completed" / "Hide completed" toggle appears only when done items exist

---

_**User (2026-03-12 08:27:53Z)**_

Internal Implementation Guide (For Onboarding Page)
This timeline outlines the first 7 days of a new client engagement and defines what should appear on the onboarding page so clients can clearly see progress during the initial setup phase.
The goal is to eliminate the “nothing is happening” window between onboarding and campaign activation.
Day 1 - Kickoff & Setup
What the system should show once the onboarding form is filled using the universal link made for throughout the engagement:
Welcome message and onboarding overview
Asset and documentation upload request (branding, decks, product links)
Workspace access confirmation
Internal objective
Capture the core inputs required for the engagement while immediately establishing visibility into the onboarding process and confirming the project setup has begun.
Day 2 - Project & Ecosystem Review
What the system should show
Project, product and provided resources review in progress 
Ecosystem and positioning analysis underway
Narrative and market positioning review
Internal objective
Signal that the team has begun internal DD and analysis so the client can see that project understanding and narrative discovery are actively underway.
Day 3 - Strategy Preparation
What the system should show
Internal strategy review in progress
Regional Narrative positioning development
KOL outreach brief preparation & translation underway
Internal objective
Convert insights from the DD phase into early campaign direction while preparing the core materials required for KOL onboarding.
Day 4 - KOL Outreach, Strategy & GTM Alignment
What the system should show
KOL selection & shortlist in preparation
Initial Content Brief in preparation
Weekly sync scheduling module
Internal objective
Move from internal analysis into execution planning by preparing the creator strategy and establishing the ongoing communication cadence with the client.
Day 5 - KOL Mapping & Outreach Preparation
What the system should show
Outreach brief being finalized.
Creator and KOL outreach & onboarding in progress
High Korea GTM Plan being prepared.
Internal objective
Prepare the distribution layer of the campaign by finalizing creator onboarding materials and aligning the regional GTM direction.
Day 6 - Campaign Tracker Deployment
What the system should show
Campaign tracker unlocked
KOL shortlist visible for review
First Content brief ready for review.
Internal objective
Transition the onboarding workspace into the campaign visibility layer so the client can monitor selections, briefs, and upcoming activations.
Day 7 - Campaign Activation Begins
What the system should show
Creator outreach initiated with translated content brief.
Content schedule planning finalized
First activations scheduled
Internal objective
Move from preparation into active campaign execution while maintaining visibility through the tracker.
System Design Principle
Throughout the onboarding week the page should always display:
Current progress stage
Upcoming milestones
Tasks awaiting client input
Tasks being handled by Holo Hive
The onboarding page should progressively evolve into the campaign tracker as activations begin, maintaining a single continuous workspace for the client throughout the engagement.

Look at this. Does this help you set a better template/preset for us to work with?

---

- Days 6-7 map to **tracker** phase

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-12 08:29:17Z)**_

Build passes (the `_document` warning is pre-existing and non-blocking).

Here's what changed with the new template based on your onboarding guide:

**Kickoff (Days 1-2)** — 3 client items + 3 Holo Hive items:
- Client: Complete onboarding form, upload assets & docs, confirm workspace access
- HH: Workspace setup, project/product review, ecosystem & positioning analysis

**Discovery (Days 3-5)** — 3 client items + 5 Holo Hive items:
- Client: Submit graphic materials vault, review campaign brief, confirm weekly sync
- HH: Strategy & narrative review, outreach brief prep & translation, KOL shortlist prep, content brief prep, regional GTM plan

**Tracker (Days 6-7)** — 3 client items + 5 Holo Hive items:
- Client: Approve KOL shortlist, approve content brief, approve content drafts
- HH: Tracker deployment, creator outreach with translated brief, content schedule finalization, first activations, performance tracking

These seed automatically when an admin opens the Action Board tab for a client. Existing seeded clients are unaffected — you can always edit/add/remove items per client.

---

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-12 08:34:48Z)**_

Build passes. Here's what changed in the portal action board design:

- **Gradient top accent bar** instead of a flat `border-t-4` — gives a more modern feel
- **Progress bar** under each header showing done/total with smooth animated transitions
- **Counter badge** (e.g. `2/6`) in a pill next to each section title
- **Subtitle text** — "Awaiting your action" for Your Court, "We're on it" for Our Court
- **Circular checkboxes** — open circles for pending, filled with checkmark for done (instead of flat icons)
- **Better hover states** with subtle background transitions
- **"All caught up!"** empty state when all items are completed and hidden
- **Eye icon** on the show/hide completed toggle for better affordance
- **Refined spacing** — `items-start` alignment so multi-line text doesn't misalign with the checkbox

---

   528→        const maxOrder = phaseItems.length > 0 ? Math.max(...phaseItems.map(i => i.display_order)) + 1 : 0;

## Summary

I've analyzed the sales pipeline page and related CRM structure. Here's what I found:

### 1. **Actions Table — Location & Rendering**

The "Actions" table is rendered in the `renderActionsTab()` function (lines 2390-2789 in `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx`).

**Key implementation:**
- Line 2151: `const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'actions' | 'outreach' | 'pipeline' | 'orbit' | 'overview' | 'templates'>('actions');`
- Lines 2627-2785: Table rendered with `<Table>` component
- Lines 2629-2638: Table headers defined

### 2. **Actions Table — Current Columns**

The Actions table has **8 columns** (lines 2630-2637):

```
1. Name              (opportunity name)
2. Stage             (sales pipeline stage)
3. Bucket            (A/B/C classification)
4. Next Action       (action label + priority icon + hint)
5. Timing            (time since last contact/bump/meeting)
6. Temp              (temperature_score visualization)
7. Owner             (team member assigned)
8. [Action Buttons]  (Execute action + alternatives dropdown)
```

### 3. **Available Data Types & Fields**

**SalesPipelineOpportunity type** (lines 125-147 in `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/salesPipelineService.ts`):

```typescript
interface SalesPipelineOpportunity extends CRMOpportunity {
  bucket: Bucket | null;                      // 'A' | 'B' | 'C'
  temperature_score: number;                  // 0-100
  dm_account: DmAccount;                      // 'closer' | 'sdr' | 'other'
  bump_number: number;                        // Number of DM bumps sent
  last_bump_date: string | null;              // ISO date
  warm_sub_state: WarmSubState | null;        // 'interested' | 'silent'
  tg_handle: string | null;                   // Telegram handle
  calendly_sent_via: CalendlySentVia;         // 'dm' | 'tg' | 'not_yet'
  calendly_sent_date: string | null;
  calendly_booked_date: string | null;
  gc_opened: string;                          // Telegram group chat opened flag
  orbit_reason: OrbitReason | null;           // 'no_budget' | 'bad_timing' | etc
  closed_lost_reason: string | null;
  dedup_key: string | null;
  next_meeting_at: string | null;             // ISO date
  next_meeting_type: string | null;
  bucket_changed_at: string | null;
  discovery_call_at: string | null;
  proposal_sent_at: string | null;
  poc_platform: PocPlatform | null;           // See below
  poc_handle: string | null;                  // Handle/ID on platform
}
```

**CRMActivity type** (lines 149-160 in `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/salesPipelineService.ts`):

```typescript
interface CRMActivity {
  id: string;
  opportunity_id: string;
  type: ActivityType;                         // 'call' | 'message' | 'meeting' | 'proposal' | 'note' | 'bump'
  title: string;
  description: string | null;
  outcome: string | null;
  next_step: string | null;
  next_step_date: string | null;
  owner_id: string | null;
  created_at: string;
}
```

### 4. **POC (Point of Contact) Data Structure**

The POC data is stored on the opportunity with two fields (lines 145-146 in salesPipelineService.ts and lines 3037-3049 in sales-pipeline/page.tsx):

```typescript
poc_platform: PocPlatform | null;
poc_handle: string | null;
```

**PocPlatform options** (lines 19 & 21-29 in `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/salesPipelineService.ts`):

```typescript
export type PocPlatform = 'twitter' | 'instagram' | 'linkedin' | 'telegram' | 'discord' | 'email' | 'other';

export const POC_PLATFORMS: { value: PocPlatform; label: string }[] = [
  { value: 'twitter', label: 'Twitter/X' },
  { value: 'instagram', label: 'Instagram' },
  { value: 'linkedin', label: 'LinkedIn' },
  { value: 'telegram', label: 'Telegram' },
  { value: 'discord', label: 'Discord' },
  { value: 'email', label: 'Email' },
  { value: 'other', label: 'Other' },
];
```

**POC Display in UI** (lines 3299-3303 in sales-pipeline/page.tsx):
- Shows a badge with the platform name in lowercase
- Shows the handle/ID next to the platform badge
- Example: `[telegram] @username`

### 5. **Opportunity & Activity Types in CRM**

**OpportunityStage types** (lines 8-12 in `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/crmService.ts`):

```typescript
export type OpportunityStage =
  | 'new' | 'contacted' | 'qualified' | 'unqualified' | 'nurture' | 'dead'  // Lead stages
  | 'deal_qualified' | 'proposal' | 'negotiation' | 'contract' | 'closed_won' | 'closed_lost'  // Deal stages
  | 'account_active' | 'account_at_risk' | 'account_churned'  // Account stages
  | 'cold_dm' | 'warm' | 'tg_intro' | 'booked' | 'discovery_done' | 'proposal_sent' | 'proposal_call' | 'v2_contract' | 'v2_closed_won' | 'orbit' | 'v2_closed_lost';  // Sales Pipeline v2 stages
```

**SalesPipelineStage types** (lines 8-11 in `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/salesPipelineService.ts`):

```typescript
export type SalesPipelineStage =
  | 'cold_dm' | 'warm' | 'tg_intro' | 'booked' | 'discovery_done'
  | 'proposal_sent' | 'proposal_call' | 'v2_contract' | 'v2_closed_won'
  | 'orbit' | 'v2_closed_lost' | 'nurture';
```

**ActivityType** (line 18 in `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/salesPipelineService.ts`):

```typescript
export type ActivityType = 'call' | 'message' | 'meeting' | 'proposal' | 'note' | 'bump';
```

     1→import { supabase } from './supabase';
     2→
     3→// ============================================
     4→// TypeScript Types for CRM Entities
     5→// ============================================
     6→
     7→// Opportunity Stages
     8→export type OpportunityStage =
     9→  | 'new' | 'contacted' | 'qualified' | 'unqualified' | 'nurture' | 'dead'  // Lead stages
    10→  | 'deal_qualified' | 'proposal' | 'negotiation' | 'contract' | 'closed_won' | 'closed_lost'  // Deal stages
    11→  | 'account_active' | 'account_at_risk' | 'account_churned'  // Account stages
    12→  | 'cold_dm' | 'warm' | 'tg_intro' | 'booked' | 'discovery_done' | 'proposal_sent' | 'proposal_call' | 'v2_contract' | 'v2_closed_won' | 'orbit' | 'v2_closed_lost';  // Sales Pipeline v2 stages
    13→
    14→export type AccountType = 'general' | 'channel' | 'campaign' | 'lite' | 'ad_hoc';
    15→export type OpportunitySource = 'referral' | 'inbound' | 'event' | 'cold_outreach';
    16→
    17→export type AffiliateStatus = 'new' | 'active' | 'inactive';
    18→export type PartnerStatus = 'active' | 'inactive';
    19→export type PartnerCategory = 'service_provider' | 'investor_vc' | 'project' | 'individual';
    20→
    21→export type LinkedType = 'opportunity' | 'partner' | 'affiliate';
    22→
    23→// ============================================
    24→// Interfaces
    25→// ============================================
    26→
    27→export interface CRMAffiliate {
    28→  id: string;
    29→  name: string;
    30→  affiliation: string | null;
    31→  category: string | null;
    32→  status: AffiliateStatus;
    33→  commission_model: string | null;
    34→  commission_rate: number | null;
    35→  terms_of_interest: string | null;
    36→  last_contacted_at: string | null;
    37→  owner_id: string | null;
    38→  poc_name: string | null;
    39→  poc_email: string | null;
    40→  poc_telegram: string | null;
    41→  notes: string | null;
    42→  created_at: string;
    43→  updated_at: string;
    44→}
    45→
    46→export interface CRMOpportunity {
    47→  id: string;
    48→  name: string;
    49→  stage: OpportunityStage;
    50→  account_type: AccountType | null;
    51→  deal_value: number | null;
    52→  currency: string;
    53→  last_contacted_at: string | null;
    54→  last_message_at: string | null;       // When lead/others last messaged in TG group
    55→  last_reply_at: string | null;          // When our bot last messaged in TG group
    56→  last_team_message_at: string | null;   // When a team member last messaged in TG group
    57→  owner_id: string | null;
    58→  source: OpportunitySource | null;
    59→  referrer: string | null;
    60→  gc: string | null;               // Telegram group chat ID
    61→  affiliate_id: string | null;
    62→  client_id: string | null;        // Links account-stage opportunities to clients
    63→  scope: string | null;            // Scope for accounts: fundraising, advisory, kol_activation, gtm, bd_partnerships, apac
    64→  notes: string | null;
    65→  position: number;
    66→  created_at: string;
    67→  updated_at: string;
    68→  qualified_at: string | null;
    69→  closed_at: string | null;
    70→  // Joined data
    71→  affiliate?: CRMAffiliate | null;
    72→  contacts?: CRMContact[];
    73→  client?: { id: string; name: string } | null;
    74→}
    75→
    76→export interface CRMPartner {
    77→  id: string;
    78→  name: string;
    79→  category: PartnerCategory | null;
    80→  focus: string | null;
    81→  status: PartnerStatus;
    82→  last_contacted_at: string | null;
    83→  owner_id: string | null;
    84→  poc_name: string | null;

    92→  // Joined data

    94→  contacts?: CRMContact[];
    95→}
    96→

    98→  id: string;

   100→  email: string | null;

   200→
   201→export class CRMService {
   202→  // ----------------------------------------
   203→  // AFFILIATES
   204→  // ----------------------------------------
   205→
   206→  static async getAllAffiliates(): Promise<CRMAffiliate[]> {
   207→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   208→      .from('crm_affiliates')
   209→      .select('*')
   210→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   211→
   212→    if (error) throw error;
   213→    return data || [];
   214→  }
   215→
   216→  static async getAffiliateById(id: string): Promise<CRMAffiliate | null> {
   217→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   218→      .from('crm_affiliates')
   219→      .select('*')
   220→      .eq('id', id)
   221→      .single();
   222→
   223→    if (error) throw error;
   224→    return data;
   225→  }
   226→
   227→  static async createAffiliate(affiliateData: CreateAffiliateData): Promise<CRMAffiliate> {
   228→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   229→      .from('crm_affiliates')
   230→      .insert([affiliateData])
   231→      .select()
   232→      .single();
   233→
   234→    if (error) throw error;
   235→
   236→    // Record stage history
   237→    await this.recordStageHistory('affiliate', data.id, null, affiliateData.status || 'new');
   238→
   239→    return data;
   240→  }
   241→
   242→  static async updateAffiliate(id: string, updates: Partial<CreateAffiliateData>): Promise<CRMAffiliate> {
   243→    // Get current state for stage history
   244→    const current = await this.getAffiliateById(id);
   245→
   246→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   247→      .from('crm_affiliates')
   248→      .update({ ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
   249→      .eq('id', id)
   250→      .select()
   251→      .single();
   252→
   253→    if (error) throw error;
   254→
   255→    // Record stage change if status changed
   256→    if (updates.status && current && current.status !== updates.status) {
   257→      await this.recordStageHistory('affiliate', id, current.status, updates.status);
   258→    }
   259→
   260→    return data;
   261→  }
   262→
   263→  static async deleteAffiliate(id: string): Promise<void> {
   264→    const { error } = await supabase
   265→      .from('crm_affiliates')
   266→      .delete()
   267→      .eq('id', id);
   268→
   269→    if (error) throw error;
   270→  }
   271→
   272→  // ----------------------------------------
   273→  // OPPORTUNITIES
   274→  // ----------------------------------------
   275→
   276→  static async getAllOpportunities(): Promise<CRMOpportunity[]> {
   277→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   278→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   279→      .select(`
   280→        *,
   281→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   282→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   283→      `)
   284→      .order('position', { ascending: true })
   285→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   286→
   287→    if (error) {
   288→      console.error('Error fetching opportunities:', error);
   289→      throw error;
   290→    }
   291→    return data || [];
   292→  }
   293→
   294→  static async getOpportunitiesByStage(stages: OpportunityStage[]): Promise<CRMOpportunity[]> {
   295→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   296→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   297→      .select(`
   298→        *,
   299→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   300→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   301→      `)
   302→      .in('stage', stages)
   303→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   304→
   305→    if (error) throw error;
   306→    return data || [];
   307→  }
   308→
   309→  static async getOpportunityById(id: string): Promise<CRMOpportunity | null> {
   310→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   311→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   312→      .select(`
   313→        *,
   314→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   315→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   316→      `)
   317→      .eq('id', id)
   318→      .single();
   319→
   320→    if (error) throw error;
   321→    return data;
   322→  }
   323→
   324→  static async createOpportunity(opportunityData: CreateOpportunityData): Promise<CRMOpportunity> {
   325→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   326→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   327→      .insert([opportunityData])
   328→      .select()
   329→      .single();
   330→
   331→    if (error) throw error;
   332→
   333→    // Record stage history
   334→    await this.recordStageHistory('opportunity', data.id, null, opportunityData.stage || 'new');
   335→
   336→    return data;
   337→  }
   338→
   339→  static async updateOpportunity(id: string, updates: Partial<CreateOpportunityData>): Promise<CRMOpportunity> {
   340→    // Get current state for stage history
   341→    const current = await this.getOpportunityById(id);
   342→
   343→    const updateData: any = { ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() };
   344→
   345→    // Set qualified_at when moving to deal stages
   346→    if (updates.stage && ['proposal', 'contract', 'closed_won', 'closed_lost'].includes(updates.stage)) {
   347→      if (current && !current.qualified_at && ['new', 'contacted', 'qualified', 'unqualified', 'nurture'].includes(current.stage)) {
   348→        updateData.qualified_at = new Date().toISOString();
   349→      }
```

```text
  2390→  // RENDER: Actions Tab
  2391→  // ============================================
  2392→
  2393→  const renderActionsTab = () => {
  2394→    const getPriorityIcon = (priority: ActionPriority) => {
  2395→      switch (priority) {
  2396→        case 'urgent': return <AlertTriangle className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-red-500" />;
  2397→        case 'high': return <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-amber-500" />;
  2398→        case 'medium': return <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-blue-500" />;
  2399→        case 'low': return <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-400" />;
  2400→        default: return null;
  2401→      }
  2402→    };
  2403→
  2404→    const getButtonVariant = (priority: ActionPriority): 'destructive' | 'default' | 'outline' => {
  2405→      if (priority === 'urgent') return 'destructive';
  2406→      if (priority === 'high') return 'default';
  2407→      return 'outline';
  2408→    };
  2409→
  2410→    const getTimingInfo = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity): { text: string; color: string } => {
  2411→      const daysAgo = (date: string | null) => {
  2412→        if (!date) return null;
  2413→        return Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(date).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  2414→      };
  2415→      const daysUntil = (date: string | null) => {
  2416→        if (!date) return null;
  2417→        return Math.ceil((new Date(date).getTime() - Date.now()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  2418→      };
  2419→
  2420→      // Cold DM — show last bump timing
  2421→      if (opp.stage === 'cold_dm') {
  2422→        if (opp.bump_number === 0) return { text: 'Not bumped', color: 'text-gray-500' };
  2423→        const d = daysAgo(opp.last_bump_date);
  2424→        if (d === null) return { text: `${opp.bump_number}/4 bumps`, color: 'text-gray-500' };
  2425→        return {
  2426→          text: `Bumped ${d}d ago`,
  2427→          color: d >= 3 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500',
  2428→        };
  2429→      }
  2430→
  2431→      // Stages with next_meeting — show meeting timing
  2432→      if (opp.next_meeting_at) {
  2433→        const d = daysUntil(opp.next_meeting_at);
  2434→        if (d !== null) {
  2435→          if (d < 0) return { text: `Meeting ${Math.abs(d)}d ago`, color: 'text-red-500 font-medium' };
  2436→          if (d === 0) return { text: 'Meeting today', color: 'text-blue-600 font-medium' };
  2437→          return { text: `Meeting in ${d}d`, color: d <= 2 ? 'text-blue-600 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500' };
  2438→        }
  2439→      }
  2440→
  2441→      // Proposal sent — show how long ago
  2442→      if (opp.stage === 'proposal_call' || (opp.stage === 'discovery_done' && opp.proposal_sent_at)) {
  2443→        const d = daysAgo(opp.proposal_sent_at);
  2444→        if (d !== null) return {
  2445→          text: `Sent ${d}d ago`,
  2446→          color: d >= 5 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500',
  2447→        };
  2448→      }
  2449→
  2450→      // Orbit — show time in orbit
  2451→      if (opp.stage === 'orbit') {
  2452→        const d = daysAgo(opp.updated_at);
  2453→        if (d !== null) return { text: `${d}d in orbit`, color: d > 90 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500' };
  2454→      }
  2455→
  2456→      // Default — days since last contact
  2457→      const lastDate = opp.last_contacted_at || opp.last_bump_date || opp.created_at;
  2458→      const d = daysAgo(lastDate);
  2459→      if (d === null) return { text: '—', color: 'text-gray-400' };
  2460→      return {
  2461→        text: `${d}d silent`,
  2462→        color: d >= 7 ? 'text-red-500 font-medium' : d >= 3 ? 'text-amber-500' : 'text-gray-500',
  2463→      };
  2464→    };
  2465→
  2466→    const currentItems = displayedActions;
  2467→    const emptyLabel = alertCardFilter !== 'none' ? 'No matching opportunities found' :
  2468→      actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' ? 'No outreach actions needed' :
  2469→      actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' ? 'No closing actions needed' :
  2470→      actionPhaseFilter === 'orbit' ? 'No orbit actions needed' :
  2471→      actionPhaseFilter === 'non_urgent' ? 'No opportunities in waiting state' :
  2472→      'No actions needed right now';
  2473→
  2474→    return (
  2475→      <div className="pb-8">
  2476→        {/* Top row: Owner filter + Phase tabs */}
  2477→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
  2478→          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  2479→            {([
  2480→              { key: 'all' as const, label: 'All Actions' },
  2481→              { key: 'mine' as const, label: 'My Actions' },
  2482→              { key: 'urgent' as const, label: 'Urgent Only' },
  2483→            ]).map(f => (
  2484→              <button
  2485→                key={f.key}
  2486→                onClick={() => { setActionFilter(f.key); setAlertCardFilter('none'); }}
  2487→                className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors ${
  2488→                  actionFilter === f.key
  2489→                    ? 'bg-sky-100 text-sky-700 border border-sky-200'
  2490→                    : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 border border-transparent'
  2491→                }`}
  2492→              >
  2493→                {f.label}
  2494→              </button>
  2495→            ))}
  2496→          </div>
  2497→          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg p-0.5">
  2498→            {([
  2499→              { key: 'all' as const, label: 'All', count: allActionItems.length },
  2500→              { key: 'outreach' as const, label: 'Outreach', count: allOutreachCount },
  2501→              { key: 'closing' as const, label: 'Closing', count: allClosingCount },
  2502→              { key: 'orbit' as const, label: 'Orbit', count: allOrbitCount },
  2503→              { key: 'non_urgent' as const, label: 'Waiting', count: allNonUrgentCount },
  2504→            ]).map(p => (
  2505→              <button
  2506→                key={p.key}
  2507→                onClick={() => { setActionPhaseFilter(p.key); setAlertCardFilter('none'); }}
  2508→                className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors ${
  2509→                  actionPhaseFilter === p.key
  2510→                    ? 'bg-white text-gray-900 shadow-sm'
  2511→                    : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'
  2512→                }`}
  2513→              >
  2514→                {p.key === 'outreach' && <Send className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2515→                {p.key === 'closing' && <Target className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2516→                {p.key === 'orbit' && <RotateCcw className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2517→                {p.key === 'all' && <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2518→                {p.key === 'non_urgent' && <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2519→                {p.label}
  2520→                <span className={`ml-0.5 text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0 rounded-full ${
  2521→                  actionPhaseFilter === p.key ? 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700' : 'bg-transparent text-gray-400'
  2522→                }`}>{p.count}</span>
  2523→              </button>
  2524→            ))}
  2525→          </div>
  2526→        </div>
  2527→
  2528→        {/* Alert Card Filter Banner */}
  2529→        {alertCardFilter !== 'none' && (
  2530→          <div className={`flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg mb-3 ${
  2531→            alertCardFilter === 'booking_needed' ? 'bg-red-50 border border-red-200' :
  2532→            alertCardFilter === 'overdue' ? 'bg-orange-50 border border-orange-200' :
  2533→            alertCardFilter === 'stale' ? 'bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200' :
  2534→            alertCardFilter === 'at_risk' ? 'bg-rose-50 border border-rose-200' :
  2535→            'bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200'
  2536→          }`}>
  2537→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  2538→              {alertCardFilter === 'booking_needed' && <Calendar className="h-4 w-4 text-red-500" />}
  2539→              {alertCardFilter === 'overdue' && <Clock className="h-4 w-4 text-orange-500" />}
  2540→              {alertCardFilter === 'stale' && <RotateCcw className="h-4 w-4 text-amber-500" />}
  2541→              {alertCardFilter === 'at_risk' && <TrendingUp className="h-4 w-4 text-rose-500" />}
  2542→              {alertCardFilter === 'meetings' && <Calendar className="h-4 w-4 text-blue-500" />}
  2543→              <span className={`text-sm font-medium ${
  2544→                alertCardFilter === 'booking_needed' ? 'text-red-700' :
  2545→                alertCardFilter === 'overdue' ? 'text-orange-700' :
  2546→                alertCardFilter === 'stale' ? 'text-amber-700' :
  2547→                alertCardFilter === 'at_risk' ? 'text-rose-700' :
  2548→                'text-blue-700'
  2549→              }`}>
  2550→                Showing: {
  2551→                  alertCardFilter === 'booking_needed' ? 'Booking Needed' :
  2552→                  alertCardFilter === 'overdue' ? 'Overdue Follow-ups' :
  2553→                  alertCardFilter === 'stale' ? 'Stale Deals (7d+)' :
  2554→                  alertCardFilter === 'at_risk' ? 'At Risk Deals' :
  2555→                  'Upcoming Meetings'
  2556→                }
  2557→              </span>
  2558→              <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs">{alertCardOppIds?.size ?? 0}</Badge>
  2559→            </div>
  2560→            <button
  2561→              onClick={() => setAlertCardFilter('none')}
  2562→              className={`p-1 rounded-md transition-colors ${
  2563→                alertCardFilter === 'booking_needed' ? 'hover:bg-red-100 text-red-400' :
  2564→                alertCardFilter === 'overdue' ? 'hover:bg-orange-100 text-orange-400' :
  2565→                alertCardFilter === 'stale' ? 'hover:bg-amber-100 text-amber-400' :
  2566→                alertCardFilter === 'at_risk' ? 'hover:bg-rose-100 text-rose-400' :
  2567→                'hover:bg-blue-100 text-blue-400'
  2568→              }`}
  2569→            >
  2570→              <X className="h-4 w-4" />
  2571→            </button>
  2572→          </div>
  2573→        )}
  2574→
  2575→        {/* Section Header */}
  2576→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 bg-violet-50 rounded-t-lg border border-violet-200 border-b-0">
  2577→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  2578→            {actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' ? <Send className="h-4 w-4 text-violet-700" /> : actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' ? <Target className="h-4 w-4 text-violet-700" /> : actionPhaseFilter === 'orbit' ? <RotateCcw className="h-4 w-4 text-violet-700" /> : actionPhaseFilter === 'non_urgent' ? <Clock className="h-4 w-4 text-violet-700" /> : <Zap className="h-4 w-4 text-violet-700" />}
  2579→            <h4 className="font-semibold text-violet-700">
  2580→              {actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' ? 'Outreach Actions' : actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' ? 'Closing Actions' : actionPhaseFilter === 'orbit' ? 'Orbit Actions' : actionPhaseFilter === 'non_urgent' ? 'Waiting — Next Steps' : 'All Action Items'}
  2581→            </h4>
  2582→            <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">{actionPhaseFilter === 'non_urgent' ? allNonUrgentCount : allActionItems.length}</Badge>
  2583→            {actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' && (
  2584→              <span className="text-[11px] text-violet-500 ml-1">Cold DM, Warm, TG Intro, Booked</span>
  2585→            )}
  2586→            {actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' && (
  2587→              <span className="text-[11px] text-violet-500 ml-1">Discovery Done, Proposal, Contract</span>
  2588→            )}
  2589→            {actionPhaseFilter === 'orbit' && (
  2590→              <span className="text-[11px] text-violet-500 ml-1">Deals in orbit — resurrect or close</span>
  2591→            )}
  2592→            {actionPhaseFilter === 'non_urgent' && (
  2593→              <span className="text-[11px] text-violet-500 ml-1">Opportunities in waiting/cooling period</span>
  2594→            )}
  2595→          </div>
  2596→          <DropdownMenu>
  2597→            <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
  2598→              <button className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium text-violet-600 hover:bg-violet-100 rounded-md transition-colors">
  2599→                <ArrowUpDown className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
  2600→                Sort: {actionSort === 'priority' ? 'Priority' : actionSort === 'stage' ? 'Stage' : actionSort === 'temperature' ? 'Temp' : actionSort === 'value' ? 'Value' : actionSort === 'newest' ? 'Newest' : actionSort === 'oldest' ? 'Oldest' : 'Name'}
  2601→              </button>
  2602→            </DropdownMenuTrigger>
  2603→            <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-40">
  2604→              {([
  2605→                { key: 'priority' as const, label: 'Priority' },
  2606→                { key: 'stage' as const, label: 'Stage' },
  2607→                { key: 'temperature' as const, label: 'Temperature' },
  2608→                { key: 'value' as const, label: 'Deal Value' },
  2609→                { key: 'name' as const, label: 'Name (A-Z)' },
  2610→                { key: 'newest' as const, label: 'Newest First' },
  2611→                { key: 'oldest' as const, label: 'Oldest First' },
  2612→              ]).map(s => (
  2613→                <DropdownMenuItem
  2614→                  key={s.key}
  2615→                  onClick={() => setActionSort(s.key)}
  2616→                  className={actionSort === s.key ? 'bg-violet-50 text-violet-700 font-medium' : ''}
  2617→                >
  2618→                  {s.label}
  2619→                </DropdownMenuItem>
  2620→              ))}
  2621→            </DropdownMenuContent>
  2622→          </DropdownMenu>
  2623→        </div>
  2624→
  2625→        {/* Table */}
  2626→        <div className="bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0">
  2627→          <Table>
  2628→            <TableHeader>
  2629→              <TableRow className="bg-gray-50/50">
  2630→                <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
  2631→                <TableHead className="w-[140px]">Stage</TableHead>
  2632→                <TableHead className="w-[70px]">Bucket</TableHead>
  2633→                <TableHead className="w-[260px]">Next Action</TableHead>
  2634→                <TableHead className="w-[120px]">Timing</TableHead>
  2635→                <TableHead className="w-[90px]">Temp</TableHead>
  2636→                <TableHead className="w-[100px]">Owner</TableHead>
  2637→                <TableHead className="w-[150px]"></TableHead>
  2638→              </TableRow>
  2639→            </TableHeader>
  2640→            <TableBody>
  2641→              {currentItems.length === 0 ? (
  2642→                <TableRow>
  2643→                  <TableCell colSpan={8} className="text-center py-12">
  2644→                    <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 text-gray-400">
  2645→                      <Zap className="h-8 w-8" />
  2646→                      <p className="text-sm font-medium">{emptyLabel}</p>
  2647→                      <p className="text-xs">All caught up — check back later</p>
  2648→                    </div>
  2649→                  </TableCell>
  2650→                </TableRow>
  2651→              ) : currentItems.map(({ opp, action }) => {
  2652→                const timing = getTimingInfo(opp);
  2653→                const stageColors = STAGE_COLORS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || STAGE_COLORS.cold_dm;
  2654→                return (
  2655→                  <TableRow
  2656→                    key={opp.id}
  2657→                    className={`group hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer ${action.priority === 'urgent' ? 'bg-red-50/40' : ''}`}
  2658→                    onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}
  2659→                  >
  2660→                    <TableCell>
  2661→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  2662→                        <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  2663→                        <span className="font-medium">{opp.name}</span>
  2664→                      </div>
  2665→                    </TableCell>
  2666→                    <TableCell>
  2667→                      <span className={`inline-flex items-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${stageColors.bg} ${stageColors.text} ${stageColors.border}`}>
  2668→                        {STAGE_LABELS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || opp.stage}
  2669→                      </span>
  2670→                    </TableCell>
  2671→                    <TableCell>
  2672→                      {opp.bucket && (
  2673→                        <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text}`}>
  2674→                          {opp.bucket}
  2675→                        </span>
  2676→                      )}
  2677→                    </TableCell>
  2678→                    <TableCell>
  2679→                      <div>
  2680→                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  2681→                          {getPriorityIcon(action.priority)}
  2682→                          <span className={`text-sm font-medium ${
  2683→                            action.priority === 'urgent' ? 'text-red-700' :
  2684→                            action.priority === 'high' ? 'text-amber-700' :
  2685→                            'text-gray-600'
  2686→                          }`}>
  2687→                            {action.label}
  2688→                          </span>
  2689→                        </div>
  2690→                        {action.hint && (
  2691→                          <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-0.5 ml-5">{action.hint}</p>
  2692→                        )}
  2693→                      </div>
  2694→                    </TableCell>
  2695→                    <TableCell>
  2696→                      <span className={`text-xs ${timing.color}`}>{timing.text}</span>
  2697→                    </TableCell>
  2698→                    <TableCell>
  2699→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  2700→                        <div className="w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
  2701→                          <div
  2702→                            className={`h-full rounded-full ${opp.temperature_score >= 70 ? 'bg-green-500' : opp.temperature_score >= 40 ? 'bg-amber-500' : 'bg-red-400'}`}
  2703→                            style={{ width: `${opp.temperature_score}%` }}
  2704→                          />
  2705→                        </div>
  2706→                        <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{opp.temperature_score}</span>
  2707→                      </div>
  2708→                    </TableCell>
  2709→                    <TableCell>{getUserName(opp.owner_id)}</TableCell>
  2710→                    <TableCell onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
  2711→                      {(() => {
  2712→                        const quickAlt = action.alternatives.find(a => a.quick);
  2713→                        const dropdownAlts = action.alternatives.filter(a => !a.quick);
  2714→                        return (
  2715→                          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  2716→                            <Button
  2717→                              variant={getButtonVariant(action.priority)}
  2718→                              size="sm"
  2719→                              className="h-7 text-xs"
  2720→                              disabled={executingAction === opp.id}
  2721→                              onClick={() => handleActionExecute(opp.id, action, opp)}
  2722→                              style={action.priority === 'high' ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : undefined}
  2723→                            >
  2724→                              {executingAction === opp.id ? (
  2725→                                <Loader2 className="h-3 w-3 animate-spin mr-1" />
  2726→                              ) : null}
  2727→                              {action.label}
  2728→                            </Button>
  2729→                            {quickAlt && (
  2730→                              <Button
  2731→                                variant="outline"
  2732→                                size="sm"
  2733→                                className="h-7 text-xs border-emerald-300 text-emerald-700 hover:bg-emerald-50"
  2734→                                onClick={async () => {
  2735→                                  if (quickAlt.label === 'Interested') {
  2736→                                    await SalesPipelineService.update(opp.id, { warm_sub_state: 'interested' });
  2737→                                    setOpportunities(prev => prev.map(o => o.id === opp.id ? { ...o, warm_sub_state: 'interested' } : o));
  2738→                                  } else if (quickAlt.actionType === 'stage_change' && quickAlt.targetStage) {
  2739→                                    handleStageChange(opp.id, quickAlt.targetStage, opp.stage);
  2740→                                  } else {
  2741→                                    openSlideOver(opp, ACTION_GUIDANCE[quickAlt.label]);
  2742→                                  }
  2743→                                }}
  2744→                              >
  2745→                                {quickAlt.label}
  2746→                              </Button>
  2747→                            )}
  2748→                            {dropdownAlts.length > 0 && (
  2749→                              <DropdownMenu>
  2750→                                <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
  2751→                                  <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 w-7 p-0">
  2752→                                    <ChevronDown className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
  2753→                                  </Button>
  2754→                                </DropdownMenuTrigger>
  2755→                                <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-44 z-[80]">
  2756→                                  {dropdownAlts.map(alt => (
  2757→                                    <DropdownMenuItem
  2758→                                      key={alt.label}
  2759→                                      className={alt.variant === 'danger' ? 'text-red-600' : alt.variant === 'warn' ? 'text-orange-600' : ''}
  2760→                                      onClick={() => {
  2761→                                        if (alt.actionType === 'stage_change' && alt.targetStage) {
  2762→                                          handleStageChange(opp.id, alt.targetStage, opp.stage);
  2763→                                        } else {
  2764→                                          openSlideOver(opp, ACTION_GUIDANCE[alt.label]);
  2765→                                        }
  2766→                                      }}
  2767→                                    >
  2768→                                      {alt.variant === 'danger' ? <X className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" /> :
  2769→                                       alt.variant === 'warn' ? <RotateCcw className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" /> :
  2770→                                       <ArrowRight className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" />}
  2771→                                      {alt.label}
  2772→                                    </DropdownMenuItem>
  2773→                                  ))}
  2774→                                </DropdownMenuContent>
  2775→                              </DropdownMenu>
  2776→                            )}
  2777→                          </div>
  2778→                        );
  2779→                      })()}
  2780→                    </TableCell>
  2781→                  </TableRow>
  2782→                );
  2783→              })}
  2784→            </TableBody>
  2785→          </Table>
  2786→        </div>
  2787→      </div>
  2788→    );
  2789→  };
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `./app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx`

```text
  1028→  // Actions Tab: getNextAction helper
  1029→  // ============================================
  1030→
  1031→  type ActionPriority = 'urgent' | 'high' | 'medium' | 'low' | 'wait';
  1032→  type ActionExecutionType = 'bump' | 'stage_change' | 'open_detail' | 'none';
  1033→
  1034→  type ActionAlternative = { label: string; actionType: ActionExecutionType; targetStage?: SalesPipelineStage; variant: 'default' | 'warn' | 'danger'; quick?: boolean };
  1035→
  1036→  const getNextAction = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity): {
  1037→    label: string;
  1038→    hint: string;
  1039→    priority: ActionPriority;
  1040→    actionType: ActionExecutionType;
  1041→    targetStage?: SalesPipelineStage;
  1042→    isActionable: boolean;
  1043→    sortScore: number;
  1044→    alternatives: ActionAlternative[];
  1045→  } => {
  1046→    const postDiscovery: SalesPipelineStage[] = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
  1047→    const terminalStages = ['v2_closed_won', 'v2_closed_lost'];
  1048→
  1049→    // Past meeting check — if there's a meeting in the past and deal is still active, prompt to log outcome
  1050→    // Skip if the opp was already updated after the meeting (rep likely already took action)
  1051→    // Skip proposal_call when proposal not sent — let the switch case handle Send Proposal flow
  1052→    const skipGlobalChecks = opp.stage === 'proposal_call' && !opp.proposal_sent_at;
  1053→    if (!skipGlobalChecks && !terminalStages.includes(opp.stage) && opp.stage !== 'orbit' && opp.next_meeting_at) {
  1054→      const meetingTime = new Date(opp.next_meeting_at);
  1055→      const now = new Date();
  1056→      const hoursSinceMeeting = (now.getTime() - meetingTime.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60);
  1057→      const lastContactAfterMeeting = opp.last_contacted_at && new Date(opp.last_contacted_at) > meetingTime;
  1058→      // Meeting was in the past (within 7 days), not yet logged
  1059→      if (hoursSinceMeeting > 0 && hoursSinceMeeting <= 168 && !lastContactAfterMeeting) {
  1060→        // For booked stage, the existing "Discovery Done" action handles this
  1061→        if (opp.stage !== 'booked') {
  1062→          return { label: 'Log Meeting Outcome', hint: `Meeting was ${hoursSinceMeeting < 24 ? 'today' : `${Math.floor(hoursSinceMeeting / 24)}d ago`} — record what happened`, priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 0, alternatives: [
  1063→            { label: 'Reschedule', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
  1064→            { label: 'No Show', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'warn' },
  1065→          ]};
  1066→        }
  1067→      }
  1068→    }
  1069→
  1070→    // BAMFAM violation — any post-discovery stage with no future meeting
  1071→    // Skip proposal_call when proposal not sent — handled by switch case
  1072→    if (!skipGlobalChecks && postDiscovery.includes(opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage)) {
  1073→      const hasFutureMeeting = opp.next_meeting_at && new Date(opp.next_meeting_at) > new Date();
  1074→      if (!hasFutureMeeting) {
  1075→        // Fix #4: discovery_done without proposal — show Send Proposal as primary, BAMFAM as hint
  1076→        if (opp.stage === 'discovery_done' && !opp.proposal_sent_at) {
  1077→          return { label: 'Book Proposal Call', hint: 'Schedule a proposal call. Also book a follow-up meeting (BAMFAM).', priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'proposal_call', isActionable: true, sortScore: 1, alternatives: [
  1078→            { label: 'Book Meeting', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
  1079→            { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
  1080→          ]};
  1081→        }
  1082→        return { label: 'Book Next Meeting!', hint: 'No future meeting set — DM to schedule', priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 1, alternatives: [
  1083→          { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
  1084→          { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
  1085→        ]};
  1086→      }
  1087→    }
  1088→
  1089→    switch (opp.stage) {
  1090→      // Fix #2: v2_contract — "Chase Signature" as primary (open_detail), "Signed!" as quick alt
  1091→      case 'v2_contract':
  1092→        return { label: 'Chase Signature', hint: 'Follow up on the contract — get it signed', priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'bump', isActionable: true, sortScore: 2, alternatives: [
  1093→          { label: 'Signed!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_won', variant: 'default', quick: true },
  1094→          { label: 'Schedule Call', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
  1095→          { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
  1096→        ]};
  1097→
  1098→      case 'proposal_call': {
  1099→        // After meeting is logged and proposal sent → move to contract
  1100→        if (opp.proposal_sent_at) {
  1101→          return { label: 'To Contract', hint: 'Proposal sent — move to contract stage', priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_contract', isActionable: true, sortScore: 3, alternatives: [
  1102→            { label: 'Follow Up', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
  1103→            { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
  1104→            { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
  1105→          ]};
  1106→        }
  1107→        // Meeting logged (last_contacted_at recent) but proposal not sent yet
  1108→        return { label: 'Send Proposal', hint: 'Draft & send the pricing proposal', priority: 'high', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 5, alternatives: [
  1109→          { label: 'To Contract', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_contract', variant: 'default', quick: true },
  1110→          { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
  1111→          { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
  1112→        ]};
  1113→      }
  1114→
  1115→      case 'cold_dm': {
  1116→        if (opp.bump_number >= 4) {
  1117→          return { label: 'Review → Orbit', hint: '4 bumps sent, no reply — shelve or orbit', priority: 'medium', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', isActionable: true, sortScore: 50, alternatives: [
  1118→            { label: 'Replied!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'warm', variant: 'default', quick: true },
  1119→            { label: 'Keep Bumping', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
  1120→          ]};
  1121→        }
  1122→        const bumpAlts: ActionAlternative[] = [
  1123→          { label: 'Replied!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'warm', variant: 'default', quick: true },
  1124→          { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
  1125→        ];
  1126→        // Fix #6: bump_number=0 but has last_bump_date (was reduced) — show "Bump" not "Send First DM"
  1127→        if (opp.bump_number === 0 && !opp.last_bump_date) {
  1128→          return { label: 'Send First DM', hint: 'Send intro DM on IG/X', priority: 'high', actionType: 'bump', isActionable: true, sortScore: 10, alternatives: bumpAlts };
  1129→        }
  1130→        if (opp.last_bump_date) {
  1131→          const daysSince = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(opp.last_bump_date).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  1132→          if (daysSince >= 3) {
  1133→            return { label: `Bump #${opp.bump_number + 1}`, hint: `Last bump ${daysSince}d ago — send follow-up DM`, priority: 'high', actionType: 'bump', isActionable: true, sortScore: 11, alternatives: bumpAlts };
  1134→          }
  1135→          const daysLeft = 3 - daysSince;
  1136→          return { label: `Wait ${daysLeft}d`, hint: 'Too soon to bump again — mark as replied if they responded', priority: 'wait', actionType: 'none', isActionable: true, sortScore: 100, alternatives: [
  1137→            { label: 'Replied!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'warm', variant: 'default', quick: true },
  1138→            { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
  1139→          ] };
  1140→        }
  1141→        return { label: `Bump #${opp.bump_number + 1}`, hint: 'Send follow-up DM', priority: 'high', actionType: 'bump', isActionable: true, sortScore: 11, alternatives: bumpAlts };
  1142→      }
  1143→
  1144→      // Fix #3: warm/interested — open detail to enter TG handle first, "Got TG!" is quick alt after
  1145→      case 'warm':
  1146→        if (opp.warm_sub_state === 'interested') {
  1147→          return { label: 'Get TG Handle', hint: 'They replied — ask for Telegram, then enter it in Edit', priority: 'high', actionType: 'bump', isActionable: true, sortScore: 15, alternatives: [
  1148→            { label: 'Got TG!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'tg_intro', variant: 'default', quick: true },
  1149→            { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
  1150→          ]};
  1151→        }
  1152→        return { label: 'Follow Up', hint: 'No reply yet — send another message on DM', priority: 'high', actionType: 'bump', isActionable: true, sortScore: 20, alternatives: [
  1153→          { label: 'Interested', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default', quick: true },
  1154→          { label: 'Got TG!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'tg_intro', variant: 'default' },
  1155→          { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
  1156→        ]};
  1157→
  1158→      case 'tg_intro': {
  1159→        const lastDate = opp.last_contacted_at || opp.last_bump_date || opp.created_at;
  1160→        const daysSinceContact = lastDate ? Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(lastDate).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) : 999;
  1161→        if (daysSinceContact >= 7) {
  1162→          return { label: 'Re-engage or Orbit', hint: `${daysSinceContact}d since last contact — nudge them on TG or shelve`, priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 5, alternatives: [
  1163→            { label: 'Booked!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'booked', variant: 'default', quick: true },
  1164→            { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
  1165→          ]};
  1166→        }
  1167→        return { label: 'Booked!', hint: 'Send Calendly link on TG to schedule', priority: 'high', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'booked', isActionable: true, sortScore: 18, alternatives: [
  1168→          { label: 'Follow Up', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
  1169→          { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
  1170→        ]};
  1171→      }
  1172→
  1173→      // Fix #1: booked with meeting — check if meeting is future vs past
  1174→      case 'booked': {
  1175→        if (!opp.next_meeting_at) {
  1176→          return { label: 'Schedule Meeting', hint: 'Set the meeting date & time', priority: 'high', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 16, alternatives: [
  1177→            { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
  1178→          ]};
  1179→        }
  1180→        const meetingInFuture = new Date(opp.next_meeting_at) > new Date();
  1181→        if (meetingInFuture) {
  1182→          return { label: 'Prep for Meeting', hint: 'Review notes & prep talking points before the call', priority: 'low', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 60, alternatives: [
  1183→            { label: 'Reschedule', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
  1184→            { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
  1185→          ]};
  1186→        }
  1187→        // Meeting is in the past — call should have happened
  1188→        const hoursSinceBookedMeeting = (Date.now() - new Date(opp.next_meeting_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60);
  1189→        const bookedPriority: ActionPriority = hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 24 ? 'urgent' : hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 72 ? 'high' : 'urgent';
  1190→        const bookedHint = hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 24
  1191→          ? 'Meeting just happened — mark discovery complete'
  1192→          : hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 72
  1193→            ? `Meeting was ${Math.floor(hoursSinceBookedMeeting / 24)}d ago — log outcome now`
  1194→            : `Meeting was ${Math.floor(hoursSinceBookedMeeting / 24)}d ago — overdue! Log outcome immediately`;
  1195→        const bookedScore = hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 24 ? 2 : hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 72 ? 8 : 1;
  1196→        return { label: 'Discovery Done', hint: bookedHint, priority: bookedPriority, actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'discovery_done', isActionable: true, sortScore: bookedScore, alternatives: [
  1197→          { label: 'Reschedule', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
  1198→          { label: 'No Show', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'warn' },
  1199→        ]};
  1200→      }
  1201→
  1202→      case 'discovery_done':
  1203→        return { label: 'Book Proposal Call', hint: 'Schedule a call to present the proposal', priority: 'high', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'proposal_call', isActionable: true, sortScore: 14, alternatives: [
  1204→          { label: 'Need More Info', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
  1205→          { label: 'To Contract', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_contract', variant: 'default' },
  1206→          { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
  1207→        ]};
  1208→
  1209→      case 'orbit': {
  1210→        const daysSinceUpdated = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(opp.updated_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  1211→        if (daysSinceUpdated > 90) {
  1212→          return { label: 'Resurrect', hint: '90+ days — re-engage or mark lost', priority: 'low', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 70, alternatives: [
  1213→            { label: 'Back to Warm', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'warm', variant: 'default', quick: true },
  1214→            { label: 'Book Meeting', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'booked', variant: 'default' },
  1215→            { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
  1216→          ]};
  1217→        }
  1218→        return { label: 'In Orbit', hint: '', priority: 'wait', actionType: 'none', isActionable: false, sortScore: 100, alternatives: [] };
  1219→      }
  1220→
  1221→      case 'nurture': {
  1222→        const daysSinceNurtureContact = (() => {
  1223→          const d = opp.last_contacted_at || opp.updated_at;
  1224→          return d ? Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(d).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) : 999;
  1225→        })();
  1226→        if (daysSinceNurtureContact >= 30) {
  1227→          return { label: 'Check In', hint: `${daysSinceNurtureContact}d since last contact — send a periodic check-in`, priority: 'medium', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 65, alternatives: [
  1228→            { label: 'Back to Warm', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'warm', variant: 'default', quick: true },
  1229→            { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
  1230→          ]};
  1231→        }
  1232→        return { label: 'Nurturing', hint: 'Recently contacted — check back later', priority: 'wait', actionType: 'none', isActionable: false, sortScore: 100, alternatives: [] };
  1233→      }
  1234→
  1235→      default:
  1236→        return { label: '—', hint: '', priority: 'wait', actionType: 'none', isActionable: false, sortScore: 100, alternatives: [] };
  1237→    }
  1238→  };
  1239→
  1240→  // ============================================
  1241→  // Actions Tab: Derived action items
  1242→  // ============================================
  1243→
  1244→  const PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES = ['cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked'];
  1245→  const POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
  1246→
  1247→  const allActionItems = useMemo(() => {
  1248→    const terminalStages = ['v2_closed_won', 'v2_closed_lost'];
  1249→    return opportunities
  1250→      .filter(opp => !terminalStages.includes(opp.stage))
  1251→      .map(opp => ({ opp, action: getNextAction(opp) }))
  1252→      .filter(({ action }) => action.isActionable)
  1253→      .sort((a, b) => {
  1254→        if (a.action.sortScore !== b.action.sortScore) return a.action.sortScore - b.action.sortScore;
  1255→        return (b.opp.temperature_score || 0) - (a.opp.temperature_score || 0);
  1256→      });
  1257→  }, [opportunities]);
  1258→
  1259→  const actionItems = useMemo(() => {
  1260→    return allActionItems.filter(({ opp, action }) => {
  1261→      if (actionFilter === 'mine') return opp.owner_id === user?.id;
  1262→      if (actionFilter === 'urgent') return action.priority === 'urgent';
  1263→      return true;
  1264→    });
  1265→  }, [allActionItems, actionFilter, user?.id]);
  1266→
  1267→  const outreachActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)), [actionItems]);
  1268→  const closingActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)), [actionItems]);
  1269→  const orbitActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => opp.stage === 'orbit'), [actionItems]);
  1270→  const allOutreachCount = useMemo(() => allActionItems.filter(({ opp }) => PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)).length, [allActionItems]);
  1271→  const allClosingCount = useMemo(() => allActionItems.filter(({ opp }) => POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)).length, [allActionItems]);
  1272→  const allOrbitCount = useMemo(() => allActionItems.filter(({ opp }) => opp.stage === 'orbit').length, [allActionItems]);
  1273→
  1274→  // Non-urgent: all non-terminal opps that are NOT actionable (waiting state) — shows their next step
  1275→  const nonUrgentItems = useMemo(() => {
  1276→    const terminalStages = ['v2_closed_won', 'v2_closed_lost'];
  1277→    return opportunities
```
