    85→function DroppableColumn({ id, children, className }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode; className?: string }) {
    86→  const { setNodeRef, isOver } = useDroppable({ id });
    87→  return (
    88→    <div ref={setNodeRef} className={`${className} ${isOver ? 'ring-2 ring-blue-400 ring-offset-2' : ''}`}>
    89→      {children}
    90→    </div>
    91→  );
    92→}
    93→
    94→function SortableCard({ id, children }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode }) {
    95→  const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({ id });
    96→  const style = {
    97→    transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),
    98→    transition,
    99→    opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
   100→  };
   101→  return (
   102→    <div ref={setNodeRef} style={style} {...attributes} {...listeners}>
   103→      {children}
   104→    </div>
   105→  );
   106→}
   107→
   108→function SortableTableRow({ id, children, className, onClick }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode; className?: string; onClick?: () => void }) {
   109→  const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({ id });
   110→  const style: React.CSSProperties = {
   111→    transform: CSS.Translate.toString(transform),
   112→    transition,
   113→    opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
   114→    position: 'relative' as const,
   115→    zIndex: isDragging ? 1 : 0,
   116→  };
   117→  return (
   118→    <TableRow ref={setNodeRef} style={style} className={`${className || ''} ${isDragging ? 'bg-blue-50 shadow-lg' : ''}`} onClick={onClick}>
   119→      <TableCell className="w-10">
   120→        <div
   121→          {...attributes}
   122→          {...listeners}
   123→          className="cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded"
   124→          onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
   125→        >
   126→          <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   127→        </div>
   128→      </TableCell>
   129→      {children}
   130→    </TableRow>
   131→  );
   132→}
   133→
   134→// ============================================
   135→// Main Page

   148→
   149→  // UI state
   150→  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');

   125→export interface SalesPipelineOpportunity extends CRMOpportunity {

   128→  dm_account: DmAccount;

   146→  poc_handle: string | null;
   147→}

   151→  opportunity_id: string;
   152→  type: ActivityType;
   153→  title: string;
   154→  description: string | null;
   155→  outcome: string | null;

   157→  next_step_date: string | null;

   160→}
   161→
   162→export interface CreateSalesPipelineOpportunityData {
   163→  name: string;
   164→  stage?: OpportunityStage;
   165→  dm_account?: DmAccount;
   166→  bucket?: Bucket;
   167→  temperature_score?: number;
   168→  source?: string;
   169→  tg_handle?: string;
   170→  owner_id?: string;
   171→  referrer?: string;
   172→  affiliate_id?: string;
   173→  deal_value?: number;
   174→  currency?: string;
   175→  notes?: string;
   176→  position?: number;
   177→  poc_platform?: PocPlatform;
   178→  poc_handle?: string;
   179→}
   180→
   181→export interface CreateActivityData {
   182→  opportunity_id: string;
   183→  type: ActivityType;
   184→  title: string;
   185→  description?: string;
   186→  outcome?: string;
   187→  next_step?: string;
   188→  next_step_date?: string;
   189→}
   190→
   191→// ============================================
   192→// Sales Pipeline Service
   193→// ============================================
   194→
   195→export class SalesPipelineService {
   196→  // ----------------------------------------
   197→  // OPPORTUNITIES
   198→  // ----------------------------------------
   199→
   200→  static async getAll(): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity[]> {
   201→    // Supabase defaults to 1000 rows — paginate to fetch all
   202→    const pageSize = 1000;
   203→    let allData: SalesPipelineOpportunity[] = [];
   204→    let from = 0;
   205→    let hasMore = true;
   206→
   207→    while (hasMore) {
   208→      const { data, error } = await supabase
   209→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   210→        .select(`
   211→          *,
   212→          affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   213→          client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   214→        `)
   215→        .in('stage', ALL_V2_STAGES)
   216→        .order('position', { ascending: true })
   217→        .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
   218→        .range(from, from + pageSize - 1);
   219→
   220→      if (error) {
   221→        console.error('Error fetching sales pipeline opportunities:', error);
   222→        throw error;
   223→      }
   224→
   225→      allData = allData.concat((data || []) as SalesPipelineOpportunity[]);
   226→      hasMore = (data?.length || 0) === pageSize;
   227→      from += pageSize;
   228→    }
   229→
   230→    return allData;
   231→  }
   232→
   233→  static async create(data: CreateSalesPipelineOpportunityData): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   234→    // Dedup check: name + tg_handle
   235→    if (data.name && data.tg_handle) {
   236→      const dedupKey = `${data.name.toLowerCase().trim()}::${data.tg_handle.toLowerCase().trim()}`;
   237→      const { data: existing } = await supabase
   238→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   239→        .select('id')
   240→        .eq('dedup_key', dedupKey)
   241→        .maybeSingle();
   242→
   243→      if (existing) {
   244→        throw new Error('A deal with this name and TG handle already exists');
   245→      }
   246→
   247→      (data as any).dedup_key = dedupKey;
   248→    }
   249→
   250→    const insertData = {
   251→      ...data,
   252→      stage: data.stage || 'cold_dm',
   253→    };
   254→
   255→    const { data: created, error } = await supabase
   256→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   257→      .insert([insertData])
   258→      .select()
   259→      .single();
   260→
   261→    if (error) throw error;
   262→
   263→    // Record stage history
   264→    await CRMService.recordStageHistory('opportunity', created.id, null, insertData.stage || 'cold_dm');
   265→
   266→    // Auto-calculate temperature score
   267→    await this.recalcTemperature(created.id);
   268→
   269→    return created as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
   270→  }
   271→
   272→  static async update(
   273→    id: string,
   274→    updates: Partial<CreateSalesPipelineOpportunityData> & {
   275→      warm_sub_state?: WarmSubState | null;
   276→      orbit_reason?: OrbitReason | null;
   277→      closed_lost_reason?: string | null;
   278→      next_meeting_at?: string | null;
   279→      next_meeting_type?: string | null;
   280→      bump_number?: number;
   281→      last_bump_date?: string | null;
   282→      bucket?: Bucket | null;
   283→      calendly_sent_via?: CalendlySentVia;
   284→      calendly_sent_date?: string | null;
   285→      calendly_booked_date?: string | null;
   286→      gc_opened?: string;
   287→      client_id?: string | null;
   288→    }
   289→  ): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   290→    // Get current state for stage history
   291→    const { data: current } = await supabase
   292→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   293→      .select('*')
   294→      .eq('id', id)
   295→      .single();
   296→
   297→    const updateData: any = { ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() };
   298→
   299→    // Auto-set timestamps on stage transitions
   300→    if (updates.stage && current) {
```
</details></tool-use>

Perfect! Now I have all the information I need. Let me compile a comprehensive report.

## Summary

I've analyzed the sales pipeline page and related CRM structure. Here's what I found:

### 1. **Actions Table — Location & Rendering**

The "Actions" table is rendered in the `renderActionsTab()` function (lines 2390-2789 in `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx`).

**Key implementation:**
- Line 2151: `const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'actions' | 'outreach' | 'pipeline' | 'orbit' | 'overview' | 'templates'>('actions');`
- Lines 2627-2785: Table rendered with `<Table>` component
- Lines 2629-2638: Table headers defined

### 2. **Actions Table — Current Columns**

The Actions table has **8 columns** (lines 2630-2637):

```
1. Name              (opportunity name)
2. Stage             (sales pipeline stage)
3. Bucket            (A/B/C classification)
4. Next Action       (action label + priority icon + hint)
5. Timing            (time since last contact/bump/meeting)
6. Temp              (temperature_score visualization)
7. Owner             (team member assigned)
8. [Action Buttons]  (Execute action + alternatives dropdown)
```

### 3. **Available Data Types & Fields**

**SalesPipelineOpportunity type** (lines 125-147 in `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/salesPipelineService.ts`):

```typescript
interface SalesPipelineOpportunity extends CRMOpportunity {
  bucket: Bucket | null;                      // 'A' | 'B' | 'C'
  temperature_score: number;                  // 0-100
  dm_account: DmAccount;                      // 'closer' | 'sdr' | 'other'
  bump_number: number;                        // Number of DM bumps sent
  last_bump_date: string | null;              // ISO date
  warm_sub_state: WarmSubState | null;        // 'interested' | 'silent'
  tg_handle: string | null;                   // Telegram handle
  calendly_sent_via: CalendlySentVia;         // 'dm' | 'tg' | 'not_yet'
  calendly_sent_date: string | null;
  calendly_booked_date: string | null;
  gc_opened: string;                          // Telegram group chat opened flag
  orbit_reason: OrbitReason | null;           // 'no_budget' | 'bad_timing' | etc
  closed_lost_reason: string | null;
  dedup_key: string | null;
  next_meeting_at: string | null;             // ISO date
  next_meeting_type: string | null;
  bucket_changed_at: string | null;
  discovery_call_at: string | null;
  proposal_sent_at: string | null;
  poc_platform: PocPlatform | null;           // See below
  poc_handle: string | null;                  // Handle/ID on platform
}
```

**CRMActivity type** (lines 149-160 in `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/salesPipelineService.ts`):

```typescript
interface CRMActivity {
  id: string;
  opportunity_id: string;
  type: ActivityType;                         // 'call' | 'message' | 'meeting' | 'proposal' | 'note' | 'bump'
  title: string;
  description: string | null;
  outcome: string | null;
  next_step: string | null;
  next_step_date: string | null;
  owner_id: string | null;
  created_at: string;
}
```

### 4. **POC (Point of Contact) Data Structure**

The POC data is stored on the opportunity with two fields (lines 145-146 in salesPipelineService.ts and lines 3037-3049 in sales-pipeline/page.tsx):

```typescript
poc_platform: PocPlatform | null;
poc_handle: string | null;
```

**PocPlatform options** (lines 19 & 21-29 in `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/salesPipelineService.ts`):

```typescript
export type PocPlatform = 'twitter' | 'instagram' | 'linkedin' | 'telegram' | 'discord' | 'email' | 'other';

export const POC_PLATFORMS: { value: PocPlatform; label: string }[] = [
  { value: 'twitter', label: 'Twitter/X' },
  { value: 'instagram', label: 'Instagram' },
  { value: 'linkedin', label: 'LinkedIn' },
  { value: 'telegram', label: 'Telegram' },
  { value: 'discord', label: 'Discord' },
  { value: 'email', label: 'Email' },
  { value: 'other', label: 'Other' },
];
```

**POC Display in UI** (lines 3299-3303 in sales-pipeline/page.tsx):
- Shows a badge with the platform name in lowercase
- Shows the handle/ID next to the platform badge
- Example: `[telegram] @username`

### 5. **Opportunity & Activity Types in CRM**

**OpportunityStage types** (lines 8-12 in `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/crmService.ts`):

```typescript
export type OpportunityStage =
  | 'new' | 'contacted' | 'qualified' | 'unqualified' | 'nurture' | 'dead'  // Lead stages
  | 'deal_qualified' | 'proposal' | 'negotiation' | 'contract' | 'closed_won' | 'closed_lost'  // Deal stages
  | 'account_active' | 'account_at_risk' | 'account_churned'  // Account stages
  | 'cold_dm' | 'warm' | 'tg_intro' | 'booked' | 'discovery_done' | 'proposal_sent' | 'proposal_call' | 'v2_contract' | 'v2_closed_won' | 'orbit' | 'v2_closed_lost';  // Sales Pipeline v2 stages
```

**SalesPipelineStage types** (lines 8-11 in `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/salesPipelineService.ts`):

```typescript
export type SalesPipelineStage =
  | 'cold_dm' | 'warm' | 'tg_intro' | 'booked' | 'discovery_done'
  | 'proposal_sent' | 'proposal_call' | 'v2_contract' | 'v2_closed_won'
  | 'orbit' | 'v2_closed_lost' | 'nurture';
```

**ActivityType** (line 18 in `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/salesPipelineService.ts`):

```typescript
export type ActivityType = 'call' | 'message' | 'meeting' | 'proposal' | 'note' | 'bump';
```

- `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx` (5392 lines)

  - Actions Table: Lines 2625-2786

- `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/salesPipelineService.ts` (729 lines)

  2671→                    <TableCell>
  2672→                      {opp.bucket && (
  2673→                        <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text}`}>
  2674→                          {opp.bucket}
  2675→                        </span>
  2676→                      )}
  2677→                    </TableCell>
  2678→                    <TableCell>
  2679→                      <div>
  2680→                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  2681→                          {getPriorityIcon(action.priority)}
  2682→                          <span className={`text-sm font-medium ${
  2683→                            action.priority === 'urgent' ? 'text-red-700' :
  2684→                            action.priority === 'high' ? 'text-amber-700' :
  2685→                            'text-gray-600'
  2686→                          }`}>
  2687→                            {action.label}
  2688→                          </span>
  2689→                        </div>
  2690→                        {action.hint && (
  2691→                          <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-0.5 ml-5">{action.hint}</p>
  2692→                        )}
  2693→                      </div>
  2694→                    </TableCell>
  2695→                    <TableCell>
  2696→                      <span className={`text-xs ${timing.color}`}>{timing.text}</span>
  2697→                    </TableCell>
  2698→                    <TableCell>
  2699→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  2700→                        <div className="w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
  2701→                          <div
  2702→                            className={`h-full rounded-full ${opp.temperature_score >= 70 ? 'bg-green-500' : opp.temperature_score >= 40 ? 'bg-amber-500' : 'bg-red-400'}`}
  2703→                            style={{ width: `${opp.temperature_score}%` }}
  2704→                          />
  2705→                        </div>
  2706→                        <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{opp.temperature_score}</span>
  2707→                      </div>
  2708→                    </TableCell>
  2709→                    <TableCell>{getUserName(opp.owner_id)}</TableCell>
  2710→                    <TableCell onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
  2711→                      {(() => {
  2712→                        const quickAlt = action.alternatives.find(a => a.quick);
  2713→                        const dropdownAlts = action.alternatives.filter(a => !a.quick);
  2714→                        return (
  2715→                          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  2716→                            <Button
  2717→                              variant={getButtonVariant(action.priority)}
  2718→                              size="sm"
  2719→                              className="h-7 text-xs"
  2720→                              disabled={executingAction === opp.id}
  2721→                              onClick={() => handleActionExecute(opp.id, action, opp)}
  2722→                              style={action.priority === 'high' ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : undefined}
  2723→                            >
  2724→                              {executingAction === opp.id ? (
  2725→                                <Loader2 className="h-3 w-3 animate-spin mr-1" />
  2726→                              ) : null}
  2727→                              {action.label}
  2728→                            </Button>
  2729→                            {quickAlt && (
  2730→                              <Button
  2731→                                variant="outline"
  2732→                                size="sm"
  2733→                                className="h-7 text-xs border-emerald-300 text-emerald-700 hover:bg-emerald-50"
  2734→                                onClick={async () => {
  2735→                                  if (quickAlt.label === 'Interested') {
  2736→                                    await SalesPipelineService.update(opp.id, { warm_sub_state: 'interested' });
  2737→                                    setOpportunities(prev => prev.map(o => o.id === opp.id ? { ...o, warm_sub_state: 'interested' } : o));
  2738→                                  } else if (quickAlt.actionType === 'stage_change' && quickAlt.targetStage) {
  2739→                                    handleStageChange(opp.id, quickAlt.targetStage, opp.stage);
  2740→                                  } else {
  2741→                                    openSlideOver(opp, ACTION_GUIDANCE[quickAlt.label]);
  2742→                                  }
  2743→                                }}
  2744→                              >
  2745→                                {quickAlt.label}
  2746→                              </Button>
  2747→                            )}
  2748→                            {dropdownAlts.length > 0 && (
  2749→                              <DropdownMenu>
  2750→                                <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
  2751→                                  <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 w-7 p-0">
  2752→                                    <ChevronDown className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
  2753→                                  </Button>
  2754→                                </DropdownMenuTrigger>
  2755→                                <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-44 z-[80]">
  2756→                                  {dropdownAlts.map(alt => (
  2757→                                    <DropdownMenuItem
  2758→                                      key={alt.label}
  2759→                                      className={alt.variant === 'danger' ? 'text-red-600' : alt.variant === 'warn' ? 'text-orange-600' : ''}
  2760→                                      onClick={() => {
  2761→                                        if (alt.actionType === 'stage_change' && alt.targetStage) {
  2762→                                          handleStageChange(opp.id, alt.targetStage, opp.stage);
  2763→                                        } else {
  2764→                                          openSlideOver(opp, ACTION_GUIDANCE[alt.label]);
  2765→                                        }
  2766→                                      }}
  2767→                                    >
  2768→                                      {alt.variant === 'danger' ? <X className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" /> :
  2769→                                       alt.variant === 'warn' ? <RotateCcw className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" /> :
  2770→                                       <ArrowRight className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" />}
  2771→                                      {alt.label}
  2772→                                    </DropdownMenuItem>
  2773→                                  ))}
  2774→                                </DropdownMenuContent>
  2775→                              </DropdownMenu>
  2776→                            )}
  2777→                          </div>
  2778→                        );
  2779→                      })()}
  2780→                    </TableCell>
  2781→                  </TableRow>
  2782→                );
  2783→              })}
  2784→            </TableBody>
  2785→          </Table>
  2786→        </div>
  2787→      </div>
  2788→    );
  2789→  };
  2790→
  2791→  // ============================================
  2792→  // RENDER: Orbit Tab
  2793→  // ============================================
  2794→
```
</details></tool-use>

  3182→                                const isSelected = form.next_meeting_at && new Date(form.next_meeting_at).getHours() === h;
  3183→                                return (
  3184→                                  <Button
  3185→                                    key={h}
  3186→                                    variant="ghost"
  3187→                                    className={`w-full justify-center font-normal text-xs h-7 px-1 ${isSelected ? 'text-white hover:text-white' : ''}`}
  3188→                                    style={isSelected ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
  3189→                                    onClick={() => {
  3190→                                      const d = form.next_meeting_at ? new Date(form.next_meeting_at) : new Date();
  3191→                                      d.setHours(h, d.getMinutes(), 0, 0);
  3192→                                      setForm(f => ({ ...f, next_meeting_at: d.toISOString() }));
  3193→                                    }}
  3194→                                  >
  3195→                                    {label}
  3196→                                  </Button>
  3197→                                );
  3198→                              })}
  3199→                            </div>
  3200→                          </ScrollArea>
  3201→                          {/* Minute column */}
  3202→                          <ScrollArea className="h-[200px] w-[50px]">
  3203→                            <div className="p-1">
  3204→                              {Array.from({ length: 60 }, (_, m) => {
  3205→                                const isSelected = form.next_meeting_at && new Date(form.next_meeting_at).getMinutes() === m;
  3206→                                return (
  3207→                                  <Button
  3208→                                    key={m}
  3209→                                    variant="ghost"
  3210→                                    className={`w-full justify-center font-normal text-xs h-7 px-1 ${isSelected ? 'text-white hover:text-white' : ''}`}
  3211→                                    style={isSelected ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
  3212→                                    onClick={() => {
  3213→                                      const d = form.next_meeting_at ? new Date(form.next_meeting_at) : new Date();
  3214→                                      d.setMinutes(m, 0, 0);
  3215→                                      setForm(f => ({ ...f, next_meeting_at: d.toISOString() }));
  3216→                                    }}
  3217→                                  >
  3218→                                    {String(m).padStart(2, '0')}
  3219→                                  </Button>
  3220→                                );
  3221→                              })}
  3222→                            </div>
  3223→                          </ScrollArea>
  3224→                        </div>
  3225→                      </PopoverContent>
  3226→                    </Popover>
  3227→                  </div>
  3228→                </div>
  3229→                <div className="grid gap-2">
  3230→                  <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Meeting Type</Label>
  3231→                    <Select value={(form as any).next_meeting_type || ''} onValueChange={v => setForm(f => ({ ...f, next_meeting_type: v }))}>
  3232→                      <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select..." /></SelectTrigger>
  3233→                      <SelectContent>
  3234→                        <SelectItem value="discovery">Discovery Call</SelectItem>
  3235→                        <SelectItem value="proposal">Proposal Call</SelectItem>
  3236→                        <SelectItem value="follow_up">Follow Up</SelectItem>
  3237→                        <SelectItem value="closing">Closing Call</SelectItem>
  3238→                      </SelectContent>
  3239→                    </Select>
  3240→                </div>
  3241→                <div className="grid gap-2">
  3242→                  <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Notes</Label>
  3243→                  <Textarea value={form.notes || ''} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, notes: e.target.value }))} placeholder="Additional notes..." className="auth-input" rows={3} />
  3244→                </div>
  3245→              </div>
  3246→              <div className="flex justify-end gap-2 mt-6 pt-4 border-t">
  3247→                <Button type="button" variant="outline" onClick={() => { setSlideOverMode('view'); setEditingOpp(null); setForm({ name: '' }); }}>
  3248→                  Cancel
  3249→                </Button>
  3250→                <Button type="submit" disabled={isSubmitting || !form.name.trim()} className="hover:opacity-90" style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}>
  3251→                  {isSubmitting ? 'Saving...' : 'Update'}
  3252→                </Button>
  3253→              </div>
  3254→            </form>
  3255→          </ScrollArea>
  3256→        )}
  3257→
  3258→        {/* View mode */}
  3259→        {slideOverMode === 'view' && bamfam && (
  3260→          <div className="px-6 py-2.5 bg-red-50 border-b border-red-200 flex items-center gap-2 text-red-700 text-sm">
  3261→            <AlertTriangle className="h-4 w-4 flex-shrink-0" />
  3262→            <span className="font-medium">BAMFAM: No upcoming meeting scheduled</span>
  3263→          </div>
  3264→        )}
  3265→
  3266→        {slideOverMode === 'view' && actionGuidance && (
  3267→          <div className="px-6 py-3 border-b border-sky-200" style={{ backgroundColor: '#f0f9fa' }}>
  3268→            <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
  3269→              <Zap className="h-4 w-4 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" style={{ color: '#3e8692' }} />
  3270→              <div>
  3271→                <p className="text-sm font-semibold" style={{ color: '#3e8692' }}>{actionGuidance.label}</p>
  3272→                <p className="text-xs text-gray-600 mt-0.5">{actionGuidance.hint}</p>
  3273→              </div>
  3274→              <Button
  3275→                variant="ghost"
  3276→                size="sm"
  3277→                className="h-6 w-6 p-0 ml-auto flex-shrink-0 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600"
  3278→                onClick={() => setActionGuidance(null)}
  3279→              >
  3280→                <X className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
  3281→              </Button>
  3282→            </div>
  3283→          </div>
  3284→        )}
  3285→
  3286→        {slideOverMode === 'view' && (
  3287→        <ScrollArea className="flex-1">
  3288→          <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
  3289→            {/* Details Card */}
  3290→            <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-4">
  3291→              <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-3">Details</h4>
  3292→              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-3 text-sm">
  3293→                <div>

  3299→                        style={{ width: `${opp.temperature_score}%` }}
  3300→                      />
  3301→                    </div>

  3303→                  </div>
  3304→                </div>
  3305→                <div>

  3307→                  <p className="font-medium mt-0.5">{getUserName(opp.owner_id)}</p>
  3308→                </div>
  3309→                <div>
  3310→                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">POC</span>
  3311→                  {opp.poc_handle ? (
  3312→                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 mt-0.5">
  3313→                      <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0 capitalize">{opp.poc_platform || 'other'}</Badge>
  3314→                      <span className="font-medium">{opp.poc_handle}</span>
  3315→                    </div>

  3317→                    <p className="font-medium mt-0.5 text-gray-400">—</p>
  3318→                  )}
  3319→                </div>

  3322→                  <p className="font-medium mt-0.5">{opp.tg_handle || '—'}</p>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-12 14:08:31Z)**_

Build passes. Here's what changed:

**URL stripping from POC handles** — `cleanPocHandle()` strips common URL prefixes:
- `https://x.com/johndoe` → `@johndoe`
- `https://twitter.com/johndoe` → `@johndoe`
- `https://instagram.com/johndoe` → `@johndoe`
- `https://linkedin.com/in/johndoe` → `@johndoe`
- `https://t.me/johndoe` → `@johndoe`
- `https://discord.gg/abc` → `@abc`
- Any other URL → strips the domain, keeps the path
- Already clean handles like `@johndoe` are left as-is

Applied everywhere POC is displayed: actions table, outreach table, and slide-over details.

**Slide-over overflow fixes:**
- Added `max-w-[calc(100vw-2rem)]` so it never exceeds the viewport on small screens
- Added `overflow-hidden` on the panel container
- Added `min-w-0` on the details grid and individual cells
- Added `truncate` on TG handle and POC handle text in the slide-over
- Added `flex-shrink-0` on platform badges so they don't compress

---

Done. Here's what was added:

**Database:** `attachment_url` and `attachment_name` columns on `crm_activities`, plus a new `crm-attachments` public storage bucket.

**Activity form:** An "Attach file" button with a paperclip icon appears below the outcome/next step row. When a file is selected, it shows the filename with an X to remove it. The file is uploaded to Supabase storage on submit and the URL is saved with the activity.

**Activity timeline:** Activities with attachments show a clickable paperclip link with the filename below the activity content, styled in teal.

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-12 15:49:15Z)**_

**90 days.** 

At line 1228-1238: orbits use `updated_at` to track how long they've been in orbit. After **90+ days**, they trigger a "Resurrect" action (`re-engage or mark lost`). Before that, they show "In Orbit" with no action required.

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="Agent"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Agent**</summary>
Explore DM templates system

```text
Perfect! Now I have all the information needed. Let me create a comprehensive summary:

## DM Templates System Summary

Based on my analysis of the codebase, here's a complete overview of the DM templates system:

### 1. **sales_dm_templates Table Structure**

The table is defined through the TypeScript interface in `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/salesPipelineService.ts`:

```typescript
// Lines 100-111
export interface SalesDmTemplate {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  stage: string;
  sub_type: string;
  content: string;
  variables: string[];
  is_active: boolean;
  created_by: string | null;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
}
```

**Columns:**
- `id` (UUID) - Primary key
- `name` (string) - Template name/title
- `stage` (string) - Sales pipeline stage (cold_dm, warm, tg_intro, booked, discovery_done, proposal_call, v2_contract, bump)
- `sub_type` (string) - Sub-category (general, initial, follow_up, bump_1, bump_2, bump_3)
- `content` (string) - The template body/message text
- `variables` (string[]) - Array of placeholder variable names like [KOL_NAME], [PROJECT_NAME]
- `is_active` (boolean) - Whether template is active
- `created_by` (UUID nullable) - User who created it
- `created_at` (timestamp) - Creation timestamp
- `updated_at` (timestamp) - Last update timestamp

---

### 2. **Template Fetching and Usage in sales-pipeline/page.tsx**

**State Management (Lines 255-261):**
```typescript
const [templates, setTemplates] = useState<SalesDmTemplate[]>([]);
const [templateStageFilter, setTemplateStageFilter] = useState<string>('all');
const [isTemplateDialogOpen, setIsTemplateDialogOpen] = useState(false);
const [editingTemplate, setEditingTemplate] = useState<SalesDmTemplate | null>(null);
const [templateForm, setTemplateForm] = useState<CreateSalesDmTemplateData>({ 
  name: '', 
  stage: 'cold_dm', 
  sub_type: 'general', 
  content: '' 
});
const [isTemplateSubmitting, setIsTemplateSubmitting] = useState(false);
```

**Fetch Function (Lines 476-497):**
```typescript
const fetchData = useCallback(async () => {
  try {
    const [opps, affs, usrs, met, outreachCount, tmpls] = await Promise.all([
      SalesPipelineService.getAll(),
      CRMService.getAllAffiliates(),
      UserService.getAllUsers(),
      SalesPipelineService.getMetrics(),
      SalesPipelineService.getColdDmsPaginated(1, 1, {}),
      SalesPipelineService.getTemplates(),  // Line 484
    ]);
    // ...
    setTemplates(tmpls);  // Line 491
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('Error fetching data:', err);
  } finally {
    setLoading(false);
  }
}, []);
```

### 4. **Activity Log Popup for Messages**

**State Definition (Lines 263-281):**
```typescript
const [activityLogPrompt, setActivityLogPrompt] = useState<{
  oppId: string;
  oppName: string;
  type: ActivityType;  // 'call' | 'message' | 'meeting' | 'proposal' | 'note' | 'bump'
  title: string;
  showMeetingPicker?: boolean;
  ownerId?: string;
} | null>(null);

const [activityLogForm, setActivityLogForm] = useState<{
  title: string;
  description: string;
  outcome: string;
  next_step: string;
  next_step_date?: string;
  meeting_date?: string;
  meeting_time?: string;
}>({ title: '', description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '' });
```

**Type Definition in Types (Line 18):**
```typescript
export type ActivityType = 'call' | 'message' | 'meeting' | 'proposal' | 'note' | 'bump';
```

**When Message Type is Set (Line 1409):**
```typescript
// From handleActionExecute when action.actionType === 'bump'
openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'message', bumpTitle);
```

**Dialog Render (Lines 4129-4389):**
- Type badge with icon (Lines 4161-4169)
- Title input (Lines 4171-4180)
- Conditional booking link section (Lines 4183-4212) - **Only shown for messages with showMeetingPicker**
- Meeting date/time pickers (Lines 4214-4308) - **Only shown if showMeetingPicker is true**
- Description textarea (Lines 4311-4321)
- Outcome input (Lines 4324-4332)
- Next step input (Lines 4334-4341)
- Next step date picker (Lines 4345-4372)

### 5. **How handleActionExecute Opens Activity Form**

**Function Definition (Lines 1402-1446):**

```typescript
const handleActionExecute = async (
  oppId: string, 
  action: ReturnType<typeof getNextAction>, 
  opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity
) => {
  setExecutingAction(oppId);
  try {
    if (action.actionType === 'bump') {
      await handleRecordBump(oppId);
      // Show activity log popup after bump
      const bumpTitle = action.label === 'Send First DM' ? 'First DM sent' : `${action.label} sent`;
      openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'message', bumpTitle);  // Line 1409
    } else if (action.actionType === 'stage_change' && action.targetStage) {
      await handleStageChange(oppId, action.targetStage, opp.stage);
      // Maps stages to activity types
      const stageActivityMap: Record<string, { type: ActivityType; title: string; showMeetingPicker?: boolean }> = {
        'warm': { type: 'message', title: 'KOL replied' },  // Line 1416
        'booked': { type: 'meeting', title: 'Meeting booked', showMeetingPicker: true },
        // ... more stages
      };
      const mapping = stageActivityMap[action.targetStage];
      if (mapping) {
        openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, mapping.type, mapping.title, mapping.showMeetingPicker, opp.owner_id || undefined);
      }
    } else {
      // open_detail actions
      if (action.label === 'Book Next Meeting!' || action.label === 'Schedule Meeting') {
        openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'meeting', 'Meeting scheduled', true, opp.owner_id || undefined);
      }
      // ...
    }
  } finally {
    setExecutingAction(null);
  }
};
```

**Open Function (Lines 1397-1400):**
```typescript
const openActivityLogPrompt = (
  oppId: string, 
  oppName: string, 
  type: ActivityType, 
  title: string, 
  showMeetingPicker?: boolean, 
  ownerId?: string
) => {
  setActivityLogPrompt({ oppId, oppName, type, title, showMeetingPicker, ownerId });
  setActivityLogForm({ 
    title, 
    description: '', 
    outcome: '', 
    next_step: '', 
    meeting_date: undefined, 
    meeting_time: undefined, 
    next_step_date: undefined 
  });
};
```

**Confirm Function (Lines 1448-1483):**
- Creates activity record via `SalesPipelineService.createActivity()`
- Updates `last_contacted_at` timestamp
- If meeting picker was shown, updates `next_meeting_at` with selected date/time

   680→  // ----------------------------------------

   682→  static async getTemplates(): Promise<SalesDmTemplate[]> {
   683→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   684→      .from('sales_dm_templates')
   685→      .select('*')
   686→      .eq('is_active', true)
   687→      .order('stage', { ascending: true })
   688→      .order('sub_type', { ascending: true });
   689→
   690→    if (error) {
   691→      console.error('Error fetching sales DM templates:', error);
   692→      throw error;
   693→    }
   694→    return (data || []) as SalesDmTemplate[];
   695→  }
   696→
   697→  static async createTemplate(templateData: CreateSalesDmTemplateData): Promise<SalesDmTemplate> {
   698→    const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
   699→
   700→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   701→      .from('sales_dm_templates')
   702→      .insert([{
   703→        ...templateData,
   704→        created_by: user?.id || null,
   705→      }])
   706→      .select()
   707→      .single();
   708→
   709→    if (error) throw error;
   710→    return data as SalesDmTemplate;
   711→  }
   712→
   713→  static async updateTemplate(id: string, updates: Partial<CreateSalesDmTemplateData>): Promise<SalesDmTemplate> {
   714→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   715→      .from('sales_dm_templates')
   716→      .update({ ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
   717→      .eq('id', id)
   718→      .select()
   719→      .single();
   720→
   721→    if (error) throw error;
   722→    return data as SalesDmTemplate;
   723→  }
   724→
   725→  static async deleteTemplate(id: string): Promise<void> {
   726→    const { error } = await supabase
   727→      .from('sales_dm_templates')
   728→      .delete()
   729→      .eq('id', id);
   730→
   731→    if (error) throw error;
   732→  }

  1400→  };
  1401→
  1402→  const handleActionExecute = async (oppId: string, action: ReturnType<typeof getNextAction>, opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
  1403→    setExecutingAction(oppId);
  1404→    try {
  1405→      if (action.actionType === 'bump') {
  1406→        await handleRecordBump(oppId);
  1407→        // Show activity log popup after bump
  1408→        const bumpTitle = action.label === 'Send First DM' ? 'First DM sent' : `${action.label} sent`;
  1409→        openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'message', bumpTitle);
  1410→      } else if (action.actionType === 'stage_change' && action.targetStage) {
  1411→        await handleStageChange(oppId, action.targetStage, opp.stage);
  1412→        // Skip activity log for stages that have their own prompts (orbit, closed_lost, tg_intro, discovery_done)
  1413→        const stagesWithOwnPrompts = ['orbit', 'v2_closed_lost', 'tg_intro', 'discovery_done'];
  1414→        if (!stagesWithOwnPrompts.includes(action.targetStage)) {
  1415→          const stageActivityMap: Record<string, { type: ActivityType; title: string; showMeetingPicker?: boolean }> = {
  1416→            'warm': { type: 'message', title: 'KOL replied' },
  1417→            'booked': { type: 'meeting', title: 'Meeting booked', showMeetingPicker: true },
  1418→            'proposal_call': { type: 'call', title: 'Proposal call set', showMeetingPicker: true },
  1419→            'v2_contract': { type: 'call', title: 'Moving to contract' },
  1420→            'v2_closed_won': { type: 'note', title: 'Deal closed won!' },
  1421→          };
  1422→          const mapping = stageActivityMap[action.targetStage];
  1423→          if (mapping) {
  1424→            openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, mapping.type, mapping.title, mapping.showMeetingPicker, opp.owner_id || undefined);
  1425→          }
  1426→        }
  1427→      } else {
  1428→        // open_detail actions
  1429→        if (action.label === 'Book Next Meeting!' || action.label === 'Schedule Meeting') {
  1430→          openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'meeting', 'Meeting scheduled', true, opp.owner_id || undefined);
  1431→        } else if (action.label === 'Log Meeting Outcome') {
  1432→          openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'meeting', 'Meeting outcome', false);
  1433→        } else if (action.label === 'Send Proposal') {
  1434→          // Mark proposal as sent, then show activity log
  1435→          await SalesPipelineService.update(oppId, { proposal_sent_at: new Date().toISOString() } as any);
  1436→          openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'proposal', 'Proposal sent');
  1437→          await fetchData();
  1438→        } else {
  1439→          const guidance = ACTION_GUIDANCE[action.label];
  1440→          openSlideOver(opp, guidance);
  1441→        }
  1442→      }
  1443→    } finally {
  1444→      setExecutingAction(null);
  1445→    }
  1446→  };
  1447→
  1448→  const confirmActivityLog = async () => {
  1449→    if (!activityLogPrompt) return;
  1450→    setIsActivityLogSubmitting(true);
  1451→    try {
  1452→      // Create the activity
  1453→      await SalesPipelineService.createActivity({
  1454→        opportunity_id: activityLogPrompt.oppId,
  1455→        type: activityLogPrompt.type,
  1456→        title: activityLogForm.title || activityLogPrompt.title,
  1457→        description: activityLogForm.description || undefined,
  1458→        outcome: activityLogForm.outcome || undefined,
  1459→        next_step: activityLogForm.next_step || undefined,
  1460→        next_step_date: activityLogForm.next_step_date || undefined,
  1461→      });
  1462→      // Always update last_contacted_at so past-meeting checks know the outcome was handled
  1463→      const activityUpdate: any = { last_contacted_at: new Date().toISOString() };
  1464→      // If meeting picker was shown and a date was set, also update next_meeting_at
  1465→      if (activityLogPrompt.showMeetingPicker && activityLogForm.meeting_date) {
  1466→        const meetingDate = new Date(activityLogForm.meeting_date);
  1467→        if (activityLogForm.meeting_time) {
  1468→          const [h, m] = activityLogForm.meeting_time.split(':').map(Number);
  1469→          meetingDate.setHours(h, m, 0, 0);
  1470→        }
  1471→        activityUpdate.next_meeting_at = meetingDate.toISOString();
  1472→      }
  1473→      await SalesPipelineService.update(activityLogPrompt.oppId, activityUpdate);
  1474→      setActivityLogPrompt(null);
  1475→      setActivityLogForm({ title: '', description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '', meeting_date: undefined, meeting_time: undefined, next_step_date: undefined });
  1476→      await fetchData();
  1477→      if (activeTab === 'outreach') await fetchOutreach();
  1478→    } catch (err) {
  1479→      console.error('Error logging activity:', err);
  1480→    } finally {
  1481→      setIsActivityLogSubmitting(false);
  1482→    }
  1483→  };
  1484→
  1485→  // ============================================
  1486→  // Helpers
  1487→  // ============================================
  1488→
  1489→  const getUserName = (userId: string | null) => {
  1490→    if (!userId) return '—';
  1491→    const u = users.find(u => u.id === userId);
  1492→    return u?.name || u?.email || '—';
  1493→  };
  1494→
  1495→  const cleanPocHandle = (handle: string): string => {
  1496→    // Strip common URL prefixes to show just the handle
  1497→    return handle
  1498→      .replace(/^https?:\/\/(www\.)?(x\.com|twitter\.com|instagram\.com|linkedin\.com\/in|t\.me|discord\.gg|discord\.com\/users)\/?/i, '@')
  1499→      .replace(/^https?:\/\/(www\.)?[^/]+\/?/i, '')
```

  4131→      call: { label: 'Call', icon: <Phone className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />, color: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700' },

  4134→      proposal: { label: 'Proposal', icon: <FileText className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />, color: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700' },

  4137→    };
  4138→
  4139→    const typeInfo = activityLogPrompt ? ACTIVITY_TYPE_LABELS[activityLogPrompt.type] : null;

  4142→    // Apply meeting_time to meetingDateObj for display

  4182→            {/* Copy Booking Link — send to prospect so they self-book */}

  4202→                    variant="outline"

  4205→                    onClick={() => copyBookingLink(bookingUserId[`activity-${activityLogPrompt.oppId}`] || activityLogPrompt.ownerId || '', activityLogPrompt.oppId)}

  4208→                    Copy Booking Link
  4209→                  </Button>
  4210→                </div>
  4211→              </div>
  4212→            )}
  4213→
  4214→            {/* Meeting Date/Time pickers */}
  4215→            {activityLogPrompt?.showMeetingPicker && (
  4216→              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
  4217→                <div className="grid gap-1.5">
  4218→                  <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Meeting Date <span className="font-normal normal-case text-gray-400">(optional)</span></Label>
  4219→                  <Popover>
  4220→                    <PopoverTrigger asChild>
  4221→                      <Button
  4222→                        variant="outline"
  4223→                        className="auth-input justify-start text-left font-normal w-full"
  4224→                        style={{ borderColor: '#e5e7eb', backgroundColor: 'white', color: activityLogForm.meeting_date ? '#111827' : '#9ca3af' }}
  4225→                      >

  4227→                        {meetingDateObj ? format(meetingDateObj, 'MMM d, yyyy') : 'Select date'}

  4231→                      <CalendarPicker
  4232→                        mode="single"
  4233→                        selected={meetingDateObj}
  4234→                        onSelect={date => {

  4236→                        }}
  4237→                        initialFocus
  4238→                        classNames={{ day_selected: 'text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white' }}
  4239→                        modifiersStyles={{ selected: { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } }}
  4240→                      />
  4241→                    </PopoverContent>
  4242→                  </Popover>
  4243→                </div>
  4244→                <div className="grid gap-1.5">

  4252→                      >
  4253→                        <Clock className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
  4254→                        {activityLogForm.meeting_time
  4255→                          ? (() => { const [h, m] = activityLogForm.meeting_time!.split(':').map(Number); return `${h === 0 ? 12 : h > 12 ? h - 12 : h}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')} ${h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM'}`; })()
  4256→                          : 'Select time'}
  4257→                      </Button>
  4258→                    </PopoverTrigger>

  4263→                            {Array.from({ length: 24 }, (_, h) => {

  4265→                              const isSelected = activityLogForm.meeting_time && parseInt(activityLogForm.meeting_time.split(':')[0]) === h;
  4266→                              return (

  4269→                                  variant="ghost"
  4270→                                  className={`w-full justify-center font-normal text-xs h-7 px-1 ${isSelected ? 'text-white hover:text-white' : ''}`}
  4271→                                  style={isSelected ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
  4272→                                  onClick={() => {
  4273→                                    const currentMin = activityLogForm.meeting_time ? activityLogForm.meeting_time.split(':')[1] : '00';
  4274→                                    setActivityLogForm(f => ({ ...f, meeting_time: `${String(h).padStart(2, '0')}:${currentMin}` }));
```
</details></tool-use>

  5176→                onClick={() => setOverviewSections(prev => ({ ...prev, orbit: !prev.orbit }))}
  5177→                className="w-full flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 bg-amber-50 hover:bg-amber-100 transition-colors"
  5178→              >
  5179→                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">

  5181→                  <h4 className="font-semibold text-amber-700">Orbit</h4>

  5183→                </div>
  5184→                {overviewSections.orbit ? <ChevronUp className="h-4 w-4 text-amber-500" /> : <ChevronDown className="h-4 w-4 text-amber-500" />}
  5185→              </button>

  5194→
  5195→        <TabsContent value="templates" className="mt-0">
  5196→          {(() => {
  5197→            const TEMPLATE_STAGES = [
  5198→              { value: 'all', label: 'All' },
  5199→              { value: 'cold_dm', label: 'Cold DM' },
  5200→              { value: 'warm', label: 'Warm' },
  5201→              { value: 'tg_intro', label: 'TG Intro' },
  5202→              { value: 'booked', label: 'Booked' },
  5203→              { value: 'discovery_done', label: 'Discovery Done' },
  5204→              { value: 'proposal_call', label: 'Proposal Call' },
  5205→              { value: 'v2_contract', label: 'Contract' },
  5206→              { value: 'bump', label: 'Bumps' },
  5207→            ];
  5208→
  5209→            const filteredTemplates = templateStageFilter === 'all'
  5210→              ? templates
  5211→              : templates.filter(t => t.stage === templateStageFilter);
  5212→
  5213→            const getSubTypeLabel = (subType: string) => {
  5214→              const labels: Record<string, string> = {
  5215→                general: 'General',
  5216→                initial: 'Initial',
  5217→                bump_1: 'Bump 1',
  5218→                bump_2: 'Bump 2',
  5219→                bump_3: 'Bump 3',
  5220→                follow_up: 'Follow-up',
  5221→              };
  5222→              return labels[subType] || subType;
  5223→            };
  5224→
  5225→            const getStageLabelForTemplate = (stage: string) => {
  5226→              if (stage === 'bump') return 'Bump';
  5227→              return (STAGE_LABELS as Record<string, string>)[stage] || stage;
  5228→            };
  5229→
  5230→            const getStageColorForTemplate = (stage: string) => {
  5231→              if (stage === 'bump') return { bg: 'bg-pink-50', text: 'text-pink-700' };
  5232→              const colors = (STAGE_COLORS as Record<string, { bg: string; text: string }>)[stage];
  5233→              return colors || { bg: 'bg-gray-50', text: 'text-gray-700' };
  5234→            };
  5235→
  5236→            const handleCopy = async (content: string) => {
  5237→              await navigator.clipboard.writeText(content);
  5238→            };
  5239→
  5240→            const handleCreateTemplate = async () => {
  5241→              setIsTemplateSubmitting(true);
  5242→              try {
  5243→                const created = await SalesPipelineService.createTemplate(templateForm);
  5244→                setTemplates(prev => [...prev, created]);
  5245→                setIsTemplateDialogOpen(false);
  5246→                setTemplateForm({ name: '', stage: 'cold_dm', sub_type: 'general', content: '' });
  5247→              } catch (err) {
  5248→                console.error('Error creating template:', err);
  5249→              } finally {
  5250→                setIsTemplateSubmitting(false);
  5251→              }
  5252→            };
  5253→
  5254→            const handleUpdateTemplate = async () => {
  5255→              if (!editingTemplate) return;
  5256→              setIsTemplateSubmitting(true);
  5257→              try {
  5258→                const updated = await SalesPipelineService.updateTemplate(editingTemplate.id, templateForm);
  5259→                setTemplates(prev => prev.map(t => t.id === updated.id ? updated : t));
  5260→                setEditingTemplate(null);
  5261→                setIsTemplateDialogOpen(false);
  5262→                setTemplateForm({ name: '', stage: 'cold_dm', sub_type: 'general', content: '' });
  5263→              } catch (err) {
  5264→                console.error('Error updating template:', err);
  5265→              } finally {
  5266→                setIsTemplateSubmitting(false);
  5267→              }
  5268→            };
  5269→
  5270→            const handleDeleteTemplate = async (id: string) => {
  5271→              try {
  5272→                await SalesPipelineService.deleteTemplate(id);
  5273→                setTemplates(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id));
  5274→              } catch (err) {
  5275→                console.error('Error deleting template:', err);
  5276→              }
  5277→            };
  5278→
  5279→            const openEditDialog = (t: SalesDmTemplate) => {
  5280→              setEditingTemplate(t);
  5281→              setTemplateForm({ name: t.name, stage: t.stage, sub_type: t.sub_type, content: t.content, variables: t.variables });
  5282→              setIsTemplateDialogOpen(true);
  5283→            };
  5284→
  5285→            const openCreateDialog = () => {
  5286→              setEditingTemplate(null);
  5287→              setTemplateForm({ name: '', stage: 'cold_dm', sub_type: 'general', content: '' });
  5288→              setIsTemplateDialogOpen(true);
  5289→            };
  5290→
  5291→            const getSubTypeOptions = (stage: string) => {
  5292→              if (stage === 'bump') return ['bump_1', 'bump_2', 'bump_3'];
  5293→              return ['general', 'initial', 'follow_up'];
  5294→            };
  5295→
  5296→            return (
  5297→              <div className="space-y-4">
  5298→                {/* Stage filter pills + New button */}
  5299→                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
  5300→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
  5301→                    {TEMPLATE_STAGES.map(s => (
  5302→                      <button
  5303→                        key={s.value}
  5304→                        onClick={() => setTemplateStageFilter(s.value)}
  5305→                        className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
  5306→                          templateStageFilter === s.value
  5307→                            ? 'bg-[#3e8692] text-white'
  5308→                            : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-200'
  5309→                        }`}
  5310→                      >
  5311→                        {s.label}
  5312→                      </button>
  5313→                    ))}
  5314→                  </div>
  5315→                  <Button size="sm" onClick={openCreateDialog} style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692' }} className="text-white hover:opacity-90">
  5316→                    <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
  5317→                    New Template
  5318→                  </Button>
  5319→                </div>
  5320→
  5321→                {/* Template cards grid */}
  5322→                {filteredTemplates.length === 0 ? (
  5323→                  <div className="text-center py-12 text-gray-500">
  5324→                    <FileText className="h-8 w-8 mx-auto mb-2 opacity-50" />
  5325→                    <p>No templates found{templateStageFilter !== 'all' ? ' for this stage' : ''}.</p>
  5326→                  </div>
  5327→                ) : (
  5328→                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
  5329→                    {filteredTemplates.map(t => {
  5330→                      const stageColor = getStageColorForTemplate(t.stage);
  5331→                      return (
  5332→                        <Card key={t.id} className="overflow-hidden">
  5333→                          <CardContent className="p-4 space-y-3">
  5334→                            <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
  5335→                              <h4 className="font-semibold text-sm text-gray-900 line-clamp-1">{t.name}</h4>
  5336→                              <div className="flex items-center gap-1 ml-2 flex-shrink-0">
  5337→                                <Button
  5338→                                  variant="ghost"
  5339→                                  size="sm"
  5340→                                  className="h-7 w-7 p-0"
  5341→                                  onClick={() => handleCopy(t.content)}
  5342→                                  title="Copy to clipboard"
  5343→                                >
  5344→                                  <Copy className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
  5345→                                </Button>
  5346→                                <Button
  5347→                                  variant="ghost"
  5348→                                  size="sm"
  5349→                                  className="h-7 w-7 p-0"
  5350→                                  onClick={() => openEditDialog(t)}
  5351→                                  title="Edit"
  5352→                                >
  5353→                                  <Edit className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
  5354→                                </Button>
  5355→                                <Button
  5356→                                  variant="ghost"
  5357→                                  size="sm"
  5358→                                  className="h-7 w-7 p-0 text-red-500 hover:text-red-700"
  5359→                                  onClick={() => handleDeleteTemplate(t.id)}
  5360→                                  title="Delete"
  5361→                                >
  5362→                                  <Trash2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
  5363→                                </Button>
  5364→                              </div>
  5365→                            </div>
  5366→                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  5367→                              <Badge className={`${stageColor.bg} ${stageColor.text} text-xs border-0`}>
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./sql/migrations/022_create_crm_tables.sql`

```text
     1→-- CRM Database Schema
     2→-- Core Tables: Opportunities (Leads+Deals), Partners, Affiliates, Contacts
     3→-- Supporting: Stage History for analytics
     4→
     5→-- ============================================
     6→-- 1. AFFILIATES TABLE (created first for FK reference)
     7→-- KOLs, referrers with rev-share or commission
     8→-- Lifecycle: New → Active → Inactive
     9→-- ============================================
    10→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_affiliates (
    11→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    12→
    13→  -- Basic Info
    14→  name TEXT NOT NULL,
    15→  affiliation TEXT, -- Their affiliation/company
    16→  category TEXT, -- Type of affiliate
    17→
    18→  -- Lifecycle
    19→  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new', -- 'new', 'active', 'inactive'
    20→
    21→  -- Commission
    22→  commission_model TEXT, -- Description of commission/rev-share structure
    23→  commission_rate DECIMAL, -- Percentage if applicable
    24→
    25→  -- Tracking
    26→  last_contacted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    27→
    28→  -- Ownership
    29→  owner_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
    30→
    31→  -- Point of Contact (inline)
    32→  poc_name TEXT,
    33→  poc_email TEXT,
    34→  poc_telegram TEXT,
    35→
    36→  -- Notes
    37→  notes TEXT,
    38→
    39→  -- Timestamps
    40→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    41→  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
    42→);
    43→
    44→-- ============================================
    45→-- 2. OPPORTUNITIES TABLE (Unified Leads + Deals)
    46→-- Single pipeline: New → Contacted → Qualified → Proposal → Contract → Closed
    47→-- ============================================
    48→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_opportunities (
    49→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    50→
    51→  -- Basic Info
    52→  name TEXT NOT NULL,
    53→
    54→  -- Pipeline Stage (unified lead + deal stages)
    55→  stage TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new',
    56→  -- Lead stages: 'new', 'contacted', 'qualified', 'unqualified', 'nurture'
    57→  -- Deal stages: 'proposal', 'contract', 'closed_won', 'closed_lost'
    58→
    59→  -- Classification
    60→  account_type TEXT, -- 'general', 'channel', 'campaign', 'lite', 'ad_hoc' (set when qualified)
    61→
    62→  -- Value (set when becomes a deal)
    63→  deal_value DECIMAL,
    64→  currency TEXT DEFAULT 'USD',
    65→
    66→  -- Tracking
    67→  last_contacted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    68→
    69→  -- Ownership & Source
    70→  owner_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
    71→  source TEXT, -- 'referral', 'inbound', 'event', 'cold_outreach'
    72→  referrer TEXT, -- Who referred them
    73→
    74→  -- Communication
    75→  gc TEXT, -- Group Chat link/info
    76→
    77→  -- Affiliate connection (for commission tracking)
    78→  affiliate_id UUID REFERENCES crm_affiliates(id),
    79→
    80→  -- Notes
    81→  notes TEXT,
    82→
    83→  -- Timestamps
    84→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    85→  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    86→  qualified_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, -- When moved from lead to deal stage
    87→  closed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE -- When won or lost
    88→);
    89→
    90→-- ============================================
    91→-- 3. PARTNERS TABLE
    92→-- BD relationships, cross-partnerships
    93→-- Lifecycle: Active / Inactive
    94→-- ============================================
    95→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_partners (
    96→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    97→
    98→  -- Basic Info
    99→  name TEXT NOT NULL,
   100→
   101→  -- Classification
   102→  category TEXT, -- 'service_provider', 'investor_vc', 'project', 'individual'
   103→  focus TEXT, -- Area of focus/expertise
   104→
   105→  -- Lifecycle
   106→  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', -- 'active', 'inactive'
   107→
   108→  -- Tracking
   109→  last_contacted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
   110→
   111→  -- Ownership
   112→  owner_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
   113→
   114→  -- Point of Contact (inline)
   115→  poc_name TEXT,
   116→  poc_email TEXT,
   117→  poc_telegram TEXT,
   118→
   119→  -- Affiliate connection (if partner is also an affiliate)
   120→  is_affiliate BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
   121→  affiliate_id UUID REFERENCES crm_affiliates(id),
   122→
   123→  -- Notes
   124→  notes TEXT,
   125→
   126→  -- Timestamps
   127→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
   128→  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
   129→);
   130→
   131→-- ============================================
   132→-- 4. CONTACTS TABLE
   133→-- Individual people linked to opportunities/partners/affiliates
   134→-- ============================================
   135→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_contacts (
   136→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   137→
   138→  -- Basic Info
   139→  name TEXT NOT NULL,
   140→  email TEXT,
   141→  telegram_id TEXT,
   142→  x_id TEXT,
   143→  role TEXT, -- Their role/title
   144→  category TEXT, -- Contact category
   145→
   146→  -- Ownership
   147→  owner_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
   148→
   149→  -- Notes
   150→  notes TEXT,
   151→
   152→  -- Timestamps
   153→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
   154→  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
   155→);
   156→
   157→-- ============================================
   158→-- 5. CONTACT LINKS (Junction Table)
   159→-- Links contacts to opportunities/partners/affiliates
   160→-- ============================================
   161→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_contact_links (
   162→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   163→  contact_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES crm_contacts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   164→
   165→  -- Linked object type and ID
   166→  linked_type TEXT NOT NULL, -- 'opportunity', 'partner', 'affiliate'
   167→  opportunity_id UUID REFERENCES crm_opportunities(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   168→  partner_id UUID REFERENCES crm_partners(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   169→  affiliate_id UUID REFERENCES crm_affiliates(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   170→
   171→  -- Role in this relationship
   172→  role TEXT,
   173→  is_primary BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
   174→
   175→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
   176→
   177→  -- Ensure only one link type is set
   178→  CONSTRAINT check_single_link CHECK (
   179→    (CASE WHEN opportunity_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
   180→     CASE WHEN partner_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
   181→     CASE WHEN affiliate_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1
   182→  )
   183→);
   184→
   185→-- ============================================
   186→-- 6. STAGE HISTORY (For Analytics)
   187→-- Tracks all stage changes for conversion/velocity analysis
   188→-- ============================================
   189→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_stage_history (
   190→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   191→
   192→  -- Object reference
   193→  object_type TEXT NOT NULL, -- 'opportunity', 'partner', 'affiliate'
   194→  object_id UUID NOT NULL,
   195→
   196→  -- Stage change
   197→  from_stage TEXT,
   198→  to_stage TEXT NOT NULL,
   199→
   200→  -- Who and when
   201→  changed_by UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
   202→  changed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
   203→
   204→  notes TEXT
   205→);
   206→
   207→-- ============================================
   208→-- INDEXES
   209→-- ============================================
   210→
   211→-- Opportunities
   212→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_stage ON crm_opportunities(stage);
   213→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_owner ON crm_opportunities(owner_id);
   214→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_source ON crm_opportunities(source);
   215→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_affiliate ON crm_opportunities(affiliate_id);
   216→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_created ON crm_opportunities(created_at);
   217→
   218→-- Partners
   219→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_partners_status ON crm_partners(status);
   220→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_partners_category ON crm_partners(category);
   221→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_partners_owner ON crm_partners(owner_id);
   222→
   223→-- Affiliates
   224→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_affiliates_status ON crm_affiliates(status);
   225→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_affiliates_category ON crm_affiliates(category);
   226→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_affiliates_owner ON crm_affiliates(owner_id);
   227→
   228→-- Contacts
   229→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contacts_owner ON crm_contacts(owner_id);
   230→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contacts_email ON crm_contacts(email);
   231→
   232→-- Contact links
   233→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contact_links_contact ON crm_contact_links(contact_id);
   234→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contact_links_opportunity ON crm_contact_links(opportunity_id);
   235→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contact_links_partner ON crm_contact_links(partner_id);
   236→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contact_links_affiliate ON crm_contact_links(affiliate_id);
   237→
   238→-- Stage history
   239→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_stage_history_object ON crm_stage_history(object_type, object_id);
   240→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_stage_history_changed ON crm_stage_history(changed_at);
   241→
   242→-- ============================================
   243→-- COMMENTS
   244→-- ============================================
   245→
   246→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_opportunities IS 'Unified sales pipeline: Leads (new/contacted/qualified) → Deals (proposal/contract/closed). Single entity journey.';
   247→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_partners IS 'BD relationships. Categories: service_provider, investor_vc, project, individual. Can also be affiliates.';
   248→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_affiliates IS 'KOLs and referrers with commission/rev-share. Lifecycle: new → active → inactive.';
   249→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_contacts IS 'Individual people who can be linked to multiple CRM objects.';
   250→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_contact_links IS 'Links contacts to opportunities, partners, or affiliates with role info.';
   251→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_stage_history IS 'Audit trail of all stage changes for analytics (conversion rates, velocity).';
   252→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-03-12 16:15:07Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./supabase_migration_multiple_contents.sql`

```text
     1→-- Migration: Change payments.content_id to support multiple content IDs
     2→-- This migration converts the content_id column from a single UUID to an array of UUIDs
     3→
     4→-- Step 1: Add a new temporary column to store the array of content IDs
     5→ALTER TABLE payments
     6→ADD COLUMN content_ids uuid[];
     7→
     8→-- Step 2: Migrate existing data from content_id to content_ids
     9→-- Convert existing single content_id values to single-item arrays
    10→UPDATE payments
    11→SET content_ids = ARRAY[content_id]
    12→WHERE content_id IS NOT NULL;
    13→
    14→-- Step 3: Drop the old content_id column
    15→ALTER TABLE payments
    16→DROP COLUMN content_id;
    17→
    18→-- Step 4: Rename content_ids to content_id
    19→ALTER TABLE payments
    20→RENAME COLUMN content_ids TO content_id;
    21→
    22→-- Step 5: Add comment to the column
    23→COMMENT ON COLUMN payments.content_id IS 'Array of content IDs linked to this payment';
    24→
    25→-- Optional: Create an index on the array column for better query performance
    26→CREATE INDEX idx_payments_content_id_gin ON payments USING GIN (content_id);
    27→
    28→-- Note: If you have any foreign key constraints on content_id, you'll need to handle those separately
    29→-- You may also need to update any RLS (Row Level Security) policies that reference content_id
    30→
```
</details></tool-use>

   479→        SalesPipelineService.getAll(),

   498→

   500→
   501→  // Persist action sort preference per user
   502→  useEffect(() => {
   503→    if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && user?.id) {
   504→      localStorage.setItem(`action_sort_${user.id}`, actionSort);
   505→    }
   506→  }, [actionSort, user?.id]);
   507→
   508→  const fetchActivities = async (oppId: string) => {

   511→      setActivities(acts);

   513→      console.error('Error fetching activities:', err);
   514→    }
   515→  };
   516→

  4394→
  4395→  const renderOrbitPrompt = () => (
  4396→    <Dialog open={!!orbitPrompt} onOpenChange={open => { if (!open) setOrbitPrompt(null); }}>
  4397→      <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-sm z-[80]">

  4400→          <DialogDescription>Select the reason for moving this opportunity to orbit.</DialogDescription>

Perfect! Now I have all the information needed. Let me create a comprehensive summary:

## DM Templates System Summary

Based on my analysis of the codebase, here's a complete overview of the DM templates system:

### 1. **sales_dm_templates Table Structure**

The table is defined through the TypeScript interface in `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/salesPipelineService.ts`:

```typescript
// Lines 100-111
export interface SalesDmTemplate {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  stage: string;
  sub_type: string;
  content: string;
  variables: string[];
  is_active: boolean;
  created_by: string | null;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
}
```

**Columns:**
- `id` (UUID) - Primary key
- `name` (string) - Template name/title
- `stage` (string) - Sales pipeline stage (cold_dm, warm, tg_intro, booked, discovery_done, proposal_call, v2_contract, bump)
- `sub_type` (string) - Sub-category (general, initial, follow_up, bump_1, bump_2, bump_3)
- `content` (string) - The template body/message text
- `variables` (string[]) - Array of placeholder variable names like [KOL_NAME], [PROJECT_NAME]
- `is_active` (boolean) - Whether template is active
- `created_by` (UUID nullable) - User who created it
- `created_at` (timestamp) - Creation timestamp
- `updated_at` (timestamp) - Last update timestamp

---

### 2. **Template Fetching and Usage in sales-pipeline/page.tsx**

**State Management (Lines 255-261):**
```typescript
const [templates, setTemplates] = useState<SalesDmTemplate[]>([]);
const [templateStageFilter, setTemplateStageFilter] = useState<string>('all');
const [isTemplateDialogOpen, setIsTemplateDialogOpen] = useState(false);
const [editingTemplate, setEditingTemplate] = useState<SalesDmTemplate | null>(null);
const [templateForm, setTemplateForm] = useState<CreateSalesDmTemplateData>({ 
  name: '', 
  stage: 'cold_dm', 
  sub_type: 'general', 
  content: '' 
});
const [isTemplateSubmitting, setIsTemplateSubmitting] = useState(false);
```

**Fetch Function (Lines 476-497):**
```typescript
const fetchData = useCallback(async () => {
  try {
    const [opps, affs, usrs, met, outreachCount, tmpls] = await Promise.all([
      SalesPipelineService.getAll(),
      CRMService.getAllAffiliates(),
      UserService.getAllUsers(),
      SalesPipelineService.getMetrics(),
      SalesPipelineService.getColdDmsPaginated(1, 1, {}),
      SalesPipelineService.getTemplates(),  // Line 484
    ]);
    // ...
    setTemplates(tmpls);  // Line 491
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('Error fetching data:', err);
  } finally {
    setLoading(false);
  }
}, []);
```

**Templates Tab (Lines 5195-5480):**
- Filter pills for stages (Lines 5197-5207)
- Template cards grid (Lines 5329-5387) showing:
  - Template name (Line 5335)
  - Stage badge (Line 5368)
  - Sub-type badge (Line 5371)
  - Content preview (Line 5374)
  - Variables display (Lines 5375-5382)
  - Copy/Edit/Delete buttons (Lines 5336-5364)

---

### 3. **Template Type Definition**

Located in `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/salesPipelineService.ts`:

**Main Interface (Lines 100-111):**
```typescript
export interface SalesDmTemplate {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  stage: string;
  sub_type: string;
  content: string;
  variables: string[];
  is_active: boolean;
  created_by: string | null;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
}
```

**Creation Interface (Lines 113-119):**
