   653→
   654→  // ----------------------------------------
   655→  // STAGE HISTORY
   656→  // ----------------------------------------
   657→
   658→  static async recordStageHistory(
   659→    objectType: 'opportunity' | 'partner' | 'affiliate',
   660→    objectId: string,
   661→    fromStage: string | null,
   662→    toStage: string,
   663→    notes?: string
   664→  ): Promise<void> {
   665→    const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
   666→
   667→    const { error } = await supabase
   668→      .from('crm_stage_history')
   669→      .insert([{
   670→        object_type: objectType,
   671→        object_id: objectId,
   672→        from_stage: fromStage,
   673→        to_stage: toStage,
   674→        changed_by: user?.id || null,
   675→        notes
   676→      }]);
   677→
   678→    if (error) {
   679→      console.error('Error recording stage history:', error);
   680→      // Don't throw - stage history is non-critical
   681→    }
   682→  }
   683→
   684→  static async getStageHistory(objectType: string, objectId: string): Promise<CRMStageHistory[]> {
   685→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   686→      .from('crm_stage_history')
   687→      .select('*')
   688→      .eq('object_type', objectType)
   689→      .eq('object_id', objectId)
   690→      .order('changed_at', { ascending: false });
   691→
   692→    if (error) throw error;
   693→    return data || [];
   694→  }
   695→
   696→  // ----------------------------------------
   697→  // UTILITY METHODS
   698→  // ----------------------------------------
   699→
   700→  static async updateLastContacted(
   701→    type: 'opportunity' | 'partner' | 'affiliate',
   702→    id: string
   703→  ): Promise<void> {
   704→    const tableName = type === 'opportunity' ? 'crm_opportunities' :
   705→                      type === 'partner' ? 'crm_partners' : 'crm_affiliates';
   706→
   707→    const { error } = await supabase
   708→      .from(tableName)
   709→      .update({
   710→        last_contacted_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   711→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString()
   712→      })
   713→      .eq('id', id);
   714→
   715→    if (error) throw error;
   716→  }
   717→

   722→  static getOpportunityStages() {
   723→    return {
   724→      lead: [
   725→        { value: 'new', label: 'New' },
   726→        { value: 'contacted', label: 'Contacted' },
   727→        { value: 'qualified', label: 'Qualified' },
   728→        { value: 'unqualified', label: 'Unqualified' },
   729→        { value: 'nurture', label: 'Nurture' },
   730→        { value: 'dead', label: 'Dead' }
   731→      ],
   732→      deal: [
   733→        { value: 'deal_qualified', label: 'Qualified' },
   734→        { value: 'proposal', label: 'Proposal' },
   735→        { value: 'negotiation', label: 'Negotiation' },
   736→        { value: 'contract', label: 'Contract' },
   737→        { value: 'closed_won', label: 'Closed Won' },
   738→        { value: 'closed_lost', label: 'Closed Lost' }
   739→      ],
   740→      account: [
   741→        { value: 'account_active', label: 'Active' },
   742→        { value: 'account_at_risk', label: 'At Risk' },
   743→        { value: 'account_churned', label: 'Churned' }
   744→      ]
   745→    };

   747→
   748→  static getAccountTypes() {
   749→    return [
   750→      { value: 'general', label: 'General' },
   751→      { value: 'channel', label: 'Channel' },
   752→      { value: 'campaign', label: 'Campaign' },
   753→      { value: 'lite', label: 'Lite' },
   754→      { value: 'ad_hoc', label: 'Ad Hoc' }
   755→    ];
   756→  }
   757→

   761→      { value: 'inbound', label: 'Inbound' },

   771→      { value: 'project', label: 'Project' },

   775→
   776→  static getAffiliateStatuses() {

   779→      { value: 'active', label: 'Active' },

   781→    ];
   782→  }
   783→
   784→  static getPartnerStatuses() {
   785→    return [
   786→      { value: 'active', label: 'Active' },
   787→      { value: 'inactive', label: 'Inactive' }
   788→    ];
   789→  }
   790→
   791→  // ----------------------------------------
   792→  // ANALYTICS HELPERS
   793→  // ----------------------------------------
   794→
   795→  static async getOpportunityMetrics(): Promise<{
   796→    totalLeads: number;
   797→    totalDeals: number;
   798→    totalValue: number;
   799→    wonValue: number;
   800→    conversionRate: number;
   801→  }> {
   802→    const leadStages: OpportunityStage[] = ['new', 'contacted', 'qualified', 'unqualified', 'nurture', 'dead'];
   803→    const dealStages: OpportunityStage[] = ['deal_qualified', 'proposal', 'negotiation', 'contract', 'closed_won', 'closed_lost'];
   804→
   805→    const { data: opportunities, error } = await supabase
   806→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   807→      .select('stage, deal_value');
   808→
   809→    if (error) throw error;
   810→
   811→    const leads = opportunities?.filter(o => leadStages.includes(o.stage as OpportunityStage)) || [];
   812→    const deals = opportunities?.filter(o => dealStages.includes(o.stage as OpportunityStage)) || [];
   813→    const closedWon = opportunities?.filter(o => o.stage === 'closed_won') || [];
   814→    const closed = opportunities?.filter(o => o.stage === 'closed_won' || o.stage === 'closed_lost') || [];
   815→
   816→    const totalValue = deals.reduce((sum, d) => sum + (d.deal_value || 0), 0);
   817→    const wonValue = closedWon.reduce((sum, d) => sum + (d.deal_value || 0), 0);
   818→    const conversionRate = closed.length > 0 ? (closedWon.length / closed.length) * 100 : 0;
   819→
   820→    return {
   821→      totalLeads: leads.length,
   822→      totalDeals: deals.length,
   823→      totalValue,
   824→      wonValue,
   825→      conversionRate
   826→    };
   827→  }
   828→
   829→  // ----------------------------------------
   830→  // TELEGRAM INTEGRATION
   831→  // ----------------------------------------
   832→
   833→  /**
   834→   * Send a message to an opportunity's Telegram group chat
   835→   * and update the last_reply_at timestamp
   836→   */
   837→  static async sendTelegramMessage(
   838→    opportunityId: string,
   839→    message: string
   840→  ): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> {
   841→    // Get the opportunity to find the gc (chat ID)
   842→    const opportunity = await this.getOpportunityById(opportunityId);
   843→    if (!opportunity) {
   844→      return { success: false, error: 'Opportunity not found' };
   845→    }
   846→
   847→    if (!opportunity.gc) {
   848→      return { success: false, error: 'No Telegram group chat ID configured for this opportunity' };
   849→    }
   850→
   851→    // Send message via Telegram API
   852→    const botToken = process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;
   853→    if (!botToken) {
   854→      return { success: false, error: 'Telegram bot not configured' };
   855→    }
   856→
   857→    try {
   858→      const response = await fetch(
   859→        `https://api.telegram.org/bot${botToken}/sendMessage`,
   860→        {
   861→          method: 'POST',
   862→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   863→          body: JSON.stringify({
   864→            chat_id: opportunity.gc,
   865→            text: message,
   866→            parse_mode: 'HTML'
   867→          })
   868→        }
   869→      );
   870→
   871→      if (!response.ok) {
   872→        const error = await response.json();
   873→        console.error('[CRM] Telegram send error:', error);
   874→        return { success: false, error: error.description || 'Failed to send message' };
   875→      }
   876→
   877→      // Update last_reply_at
   878→      await supabase
   879→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   880→        .update({
   881→          last_reply_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   882→          updated_at: new Date().toISOString()
   883→        })
   884→        .eq('id', opportunityId);
   885→
   886→      return { success: true };
   887→    } catch (error) {
   888→      console.error('[CRM] Error sending Telegram message:', error);
   889→      return { success: false, error: 'Failed to send message' };
   890→    }
   891→  }
   892→
   893→  /**
   894→   * Get opportunities that haven't been contacted recently
   895→   */
   896→  static async getStaleOpportunities(daysThreshold: number = 7): Promise<CRMOpportunity[]> {
   897→    const thresholdDate = new Date();
   898→    thresholdDate.setDate(thresholdDate.getDate() - daysThreshold);
   899→
```
</details></tool-use>

    85→function DroppableColumn({ id, children, className }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode; className?: string }) {
    86→  const { setNodeRef, isOver } = useDroppable({ id });
    87→  return (
    88→    <div ref={setNodeRef} className={`${className} ${isOver ? 'ring-2 ring-blue-400 ring-offset-2' : ''}`}>
    89→      {children}
    90→    </div>
    91→  );
    92→}
    93→
    94→function SortableCard({ id, children }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode }) {
    95→  const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({ id });
    96→  const style = {
    97→    transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),
    98→    transition,
    99→    opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
   100→  };
   101→  return (
   102→    <div ref={setNodeRef} style={style} {...attributes} {...listeners}>
   103→      {children}
   104→    </div>
   105→  );
   106→}
   107→
   108→function SortableTableRow({ id, children, className, onClick }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode; className?: string; onClick?: () => void }) {
   109→  const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({ id });
   110→  const style: React.CSSProperties = {
   111→    transform: CSS.Translate.toString(transform),
   112→    transition,
   113→    opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
   114→    position: 'relative' as const,
   115→    zIndex: isDragging ? 1 : 0,
   116→  };
   117→  return (
   118→    <TableRow ref={setNodeRef} style={style} className={`${className || ''} ${isDragging ? 'bg-blue-50 shadow-lg' : ''}`} onClick={onClick}>
   119→      <TableCell className="w-10">
   120→        <div
   121→          {...attributes}
   122→          {...listeners}
   123→          className="cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded"
   124→          onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
   125→        >
   126→          <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   127→        </div>
   128→      </TableCell>
   129→      {children}
   130→    </TableRow>
   131→  );
   132→}

   121→// ============================================

   125→export interface SalesPipelineOpportunity extends CRMOpportunity {
   126→  bucket: Bucket | null;
   127→  temperature_score: number;
   128→  dm_account: DmAccount;

   130→  last_bump_date: string | null;

   141→  next_meeting_type: string | null;

   144→  proposal_sent_at: string | null;

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-03-13 18:29:01Z)**_

Let me check migration 024 since it seems to deal with opportunities:

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-03-13 18:29:01Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./sql/migrations/024_opportunity_position.sql`

```text
     1→-- Add position column to crm_opportunities for custom ordering
     2→ALTER TABLE crm_opportunities ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS position INTEGER DEFAULT 0;
     3→
     4→-- Set initial positions based on created_at (newest first = lowest position)
     5→WITH numbered AS (
     6→  SELECT id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY created_at DESC) as rn
     7→  FROM crm_opportunities
     8→)
     9→UPDATE crm_opportunities
    10→SET position = numbered.rn
    11→FROM numbered
    12→WHERE crm_opportunities.id = numbered.id;
    13→
    14→-- Create index for faster ordering
    15→CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_crm_opportunities_position ON crm_opportunities(position);
    16→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./supabase_migration_multiple_contents.sql`

```text
     1→-- Migration: Change payments.content_id to support multiple content IDs
     2→-- This migration converts the content_id column from a single UUID to an array of UUIDs
     3→
     4→-- Step 1: Add a new temporary column to store the array of content IDs
     5→ALTER TABLE payments
     6→ADD COLUMN content_ids uuid[];
     7→
     8→-- Step 2: Migrate existing data from content_id to content_ids
     9→-- Convert existing single content_id values to single-item arrays
    10→UPDATE payments
    11→SET content_ids = ARRAY[content_id]
    12→WHERE content_id IS NOT NULL;
    13→
    14→-- Step 3: Drop the old content_id column
    15→ALTER TABLE payments
    16→DROP COLUMN content_id;
    17→
    18→-- Step 4: Rename content_ids to content_id
    19→ALTER TABLE payments
    20→RENAME COLUMN content_ids TO content_id;
    21→
    22→-- Step 5: Add comment to the column
    23→COMMENT ON COLUMN payments.content_id IS 'Array of content IDs linked to this payment';
    24→
    25→-- Optional: Create an index on the array column for better query performance
    26→CREATE INDEX idx_payments_content_id_gin ON payments USING GIN (content_id);
    27→
    28→-- Note: If you have any foreign key constraints on content_id, you'll need to handle those separately
    29→-- You may also need to update any RLS (Row Level Security) policies that reference content_id
    30→
```
</details></tool-use>

   280→  }>({ title: '', description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '' });

   282→

   285→    useSensor(PointerSensor, { activationConstraint: { distance: 8 } }),
   286→    useSensor(KeyboardSensor)
   287→  );
   288→
   289→  // ============================================
   290→  // Dashboard Metrics (computed from opportunities)
   291→  // ============================================
   292→
   293→  const dashboardMetrics = useMemo(() => {
   294→    const all = opportunities;
   295→    const pipelineActive = all.filter(o => PIPELINE_STAGES.includes(o.stage as SalesPipelineStage));
   296→    const closedWon = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'v2_closed_won');
   297→    const closedLost = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'v2_closed_lost');
   298→    const inOrbit = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'orbit');
   299→
   300→    // Stages past cold_dm = responded
   301→    const pastColdDm = all.filter(o => o.stage !== 'cold_dm');
   302→    const coldDmCount = outreachTotal > 0 ? outreachTotal : all.filter(o => o.stage === 'cold_dm').length;
   303→    const totalDmsSent = all.length; // every opp started as a DM
   304→    const responseRate = totalDmsSent > 0 ? (pastColdDm.length / totalDmsSent) * 100 : 0;
   305→
   306→    // Meetings booked = in booked or any stage after it
   307→    const bookedAndBeyond = ['booked', 'discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'];
   308→    const meetingsBooked = all.filter(o => bookedAndBeyond.includes(o.stage)).length;
   309→
   310→    // Discovery calls = in discovery_done or later
   311→    const discoveryAndBeyond = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'];
   312→    const discoveryCalls = all.filter(o => discoveryAndBeyond.includes(o.stage)).length;
   313→
   314→    // Close rate = won / (won + lost)
   315→    const totalClosed = closedWon.length + closedLost.length;
   316→    const closeRate = totalClosed > 0 ? (closedWon.length / totalClosed) * 100 : 0;
   317→
   318→    // Avg deal size (closed won)
   319→    const wonValues = closedWon.map(o => o.deal_value || 0).filter(v => v > 0);
   320→    const avgDealSize = wonValues.length > 0 ? wonValues.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / wonValues.length : 0;
   321→
   322→    // Avg close time (days from created_at to closed_at for won deals)
   323→    const closeTimes = closedWon
   324→      .filter(o => o.created_at && o.closed_at)
   325→      .map(o => (new Date(o.closed_at!).getTime() - new Date(o.created_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   326→    const avgCloseTime = closeTimes.length > 0 ? closeTimes.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / closeTimes.length : 0;
   327→
   328→    // Qualified % = bucket A + B / total
   329→    const qualifiedCount = all.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A' || o.bucket === 'B').length;
   330→    const qualifiedPct = all.length > 0 ? (qualifiedCount / all.length) * 100 : 0;
   331→
   332→    // Bucket A %
   333→    const bucketAPct = all.length > 0 ? (all.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A').length / all.length) * 100 : 0;
   334→
   335→    // Pipeline value (active)
   336→    const pipelineValue = pipelineActive.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
   337→
   338→    // Overdue follow-ups
   339→    const now = new Date().toISOString();
   340→    const overdueFollowups = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
   341→      o.next_meeting_at && o.next_meeting_at < now
   342→    ).length;
   343→
   344→    // Proposals sent
   345→    const proposalsSent = all.filter(o =>
   346→      ['proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'].includes(o.stage)
   347→    ).length;
   348→
   349→    // Alert metrics for manager cards
   350→    const nowDate = new Date();
   351→    const todayStart = new Date(nowDate.getFullYear(), nowDate.getMonth(), nowDate.getDate());
   352→    const weekEnd = new Date(todayStart.getTime() + 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
   353→    const meetingsThisWeek = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
   354→      o.next_meeting_at && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) >= todayStart && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) < weekEnd
   355→    ).length;
   356→    const meetingsToday = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
   357→      o.next_meeting_at && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) >= todayStart && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) < new Date(todayStart.getTime() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)
   358→    ).length;
   359→
   360→    // Stale deals: active pipeline deals with no contact in 7+ days
   361→    const staleDeals = pipelineActive.filter(o => {
   362→      const lastDate = o.last_contacted_at || o.last_bump_date || o.created_at;
   363→      if (!lastDate) return true;
   364→      const daysSince = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(lastDate).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   365→      return daysSince >= 7;
   366→    }).length;
   367→
   368→    // Deals at risk: closing-stage deals (post-discovery) with temp < 40
   369→    const dealsAtRisk = all.filter(o =>
   370→      ['discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'].includes(o.stage) && o.temperature_score < 40
   371→    ).length;
   372→
   373→    // Total revenue (closed won value)
   374→    const totalRevenue = closedWon.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
   375→

   378→      cold_dm: 0.05, warm: 0.1, tg_intro: 0.15, booked: 0.25,
   379→      discovery_done: 0.4, proposal_call: 0.7, v2_contract: 0.9,

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-03-13 18:32:39Z)**_

Perfect! I now have a comprehensive understanding of the system. Let me compile the final report:

## Comprehensive Data Map: Sales Pipeline Activity Timeline System

Based on my thorough research of the codebase, here's what I found:

### 1. **DATABASE SCHEMA: Core CRM Tables**

#### `crm_opportunities` (Main Opportunities Table)
**Base Fields** (from `crm_opportunities`):
- `id` (UUID, PK)
- `name` (TEXT)
- `stage` (TEXT) - unified pipeline stage
- `account_type` (TEXT) - classification
- `deal_value` (DECIMAL)
- `currency` (TEXT, default USD)
- `last_contacted_at` (TIMESTAMP)
- `owner_id` (FK to auth.users)
- `source` (TEXT) - referral, inbound, event, cold_outreach
- `referrer` (TEXT)
- `gc` (TEXT) - Telegram group chat link
- `affiliate_id` (FK to crm_affiliates)
- `notes` (TEXT)
- `position` (INTEGER) - for custom drag-and-drop ordering
- `created_at`, `updated_at`, `qualified_at`, `closed_at` (TIMESTAMPS)

**Sales Pipeline v2 Extensions** (added fields for sales-pipeline-specific data):
- `bucket` (A/B/C) - qualification level
- `temperature_score` (NUMBER) - engagement score (calculated via RPC function)
- `dm_account` (closer | sdr | other) - account responsible for DM
- `bump_number` (INTEGER) - count of follow-up attempts
- `last_bump_date` (TIMESTAMP) - when last follow-up was sent
- `warm_sub_state` (interested | silent) - sub-state for warm leads
- `tg_handle` (TEXT) - target's Telegram handle
- `calendly_sent_via` (dm | tg | not_yet) - how Calendly link was shared
- `calendly_sent_date` (TIMESTAMP)
- `calendly_booked_date` (TIMESTAMP) - when they booked
- `gc_opened` (TEXT) - whether they opened the group chat
- `orbit_reason` (no_budget | bad_timing | no_response | competitor | other)
- `closed_lost_reason` (TEXT)
- `dedup_key` (TEXT) - name::tg_handle for deduplication
- `next_meeting_at` (TIMESTAMP) - scheduled next meeting
- `next_meeting_type` (TEXT) - type of meeting
- `bucket_changed_at` (TIMESTAMP) - when bucket was changed
- `discovery_call_at` (TIMESTAMP) - auto-set when entering discovery_done
- `proposal_sent_at` (TIMESTAMP) - auto-set when entering proposal_sent
- `poc_platform` (twitter | instagram | linkedin | telegram | discord | email | other)
- `poc_handle` (TEXT) - point of contact handle
- `last_message_at` (TIMESTAMP) - when lead last messaged in TG
- `last_reply_at` (TIMESTAMP) - when bot last replied in TG
- `last_team_message_at` (TIMESTAMP) - when team member last messaged
- `client_id` (FK to clients) - links account-stage opportunities to clients
- `scope` (TEXT) - scope for accounts: fundraising, advisory, kol_activation, gtm, bd_partnerships, apac

**Indexed Fields**:
- stage, owner_id, source, affiliate_id, created_at, position

#### `crm_activities` (Activity Timeline - NOT YET FULLY CREATED)
**Status**: Referenced in code but migration not yet applied. Fields expected:
- `id` (UUID, PK)
- `opportunity_id` (FK to crm_opportunities)
- `type` (call | message | meeting | proposal | note | bump) - activity type
- `title` (TEXT) - activity title
- `description` (TEXT, nullable)
- `outcome` (TEXT, nullable) - result of activity
- `next_step` (TEXT, nullable) - follow-up action
- `next_step_date` (TEXT, nullable) - when next step should happen
- `owner_id` (FK to auth.users, nullable) - who created activity
- `attachment_url` (TEXT, nullable)
- `attachment_name` (TEXT, nullable)
- `created_at` (TIMESTAMP)

#### `crm_stage_history` (Stage Change Audit Trail)
- `id` (UUID, PK)
- `object_type` (TEXT) - 'opportunity', 'partner', 'affiliate'
- `object_id` (UUID)
- `from_stage` (TEXT, nullable) - previous stage
- `to_stage` (TEXT) - new stage
- `changed_by` (FK to auth.users, nullable)
- `changed_at` (TIMESTAMP, default NOW())
- `notes` (TEXT, nullable)

**Indexes**: object_type + object_id, changed_at
**Policy**: Immutable (no update/delete allowed - audit trail)

#### `crm_affiliates` (KOLs & Referrers)
- `id`, `name`, `affiliation`, `category`, `status` (new | active | inactive)
- `commission_model`, `commission_rate`, `terms_of_interest`
- `last_contacted_at`, `owner_id`
- `poc_name`, `poc_email`, `poc_telegram`
- `notes`, `created_at`, `updated_at`

#### `crm_partners` (BD Relationships)
- Similar structure to affiliates + `focus`, `is_affiliate`, `affiliate_id`

#### `crm_contacts` (Individual People)
- `id`, `name`, `email`, `telegram_id`, `x_id`, `role`, `category`, `owner_id`, `notes`, timestamps

#### `crm_contact_links` (Junction Table)
- Links contacts to opportunities/partners/affiliates with `role` and `is_primary` flag

---

### 2. **OPPORTUNITY STAGES (Sales Pipeline v2)**

**Active Pipeline Stages** (PIPELINE_STAGES):
```
cold_dm → warm → [tg_intro OR booked] → discovery_done 
→ proposal_call → v2_contract → v2_closed_won
```

**All Possible Stages** (ALL_V2_STAGES):
- `cold_dm` - Initial outreach
- `warm` - Responded/interested
- `tg_intro` - Telegram intro done (Path B)
- `booked` - Call booked
- `discovery_done` - Discovery call completed
- `proposal_sent` - Proposal sent out
- `proposal_call` - Proposal discussion call
- `v2_contract` - In contract phase
- `v2_closed_won` - Deal won
- `orbit` - On hold (budget/timing issues)
- `v2_closed_lost` - Deal lost
- `nurture` - Long-term follow-up

**Two Sales Paths**:
- **Path A** (closer): cold_dm → warm → booked → discovery_done → proposal_call → v2_contract → v2_closed_won
- **Path B** (sdr): cold_dm → warm → tg_intro → booked → discovery_done → proposal_call → v2_contract → v2_closed_won

---

### 3. **ACTIVITY TYPES & TRACKING**

**Activity Types**:
- `call` - Phone/video calls
- `message` - Messages sent
- `meeting` - Scheduled meetings
- `proposal` - Proposal-related
- `note` - General notes
- `bump` - Follow-up attempts (auto-tracked with bump_number)

**When Activities Are Created**:
- `recordBump()` - Auto-creates a "bump" activity + increments bump_number
- `createActivity()` - Manual activity creation with full details (outcome, next_step, attachments)

**Associated Metadata Per Opportunity**:
- `last_contacted_at` - Last any contact (bumps, messages, etc)
- `last_bump_date` - When last follow-up sent
- `last_message_at` / `last_reply_at` / `last_team_message_at` - Telegram messaging tracking
- `bump_number` - Total follow-up count
- `next_meeting_at` / `next_meeting_type` - Scheduled next action
- `calendly_sent_date` / `calendly_booked_date` - Calendar booking tracking
- `discovery_call_at` / `proposal_sent_at` / `bucket_changed_at` - Stage-specific timestamps

---

### 4. **TEMPLATES SYSTEM**

**`sales_dm_templates` Table**:
- `id`, `name`, `stage`, `sub_type`, `content` (TEXT)
- `variables` (array of variable names)
- `is_active` (BOOLEAN)
- `created_by` (FK to auth.users)
- `created_at`, `updated_at`

**Service Methods**:
- `getTemplates()` - Get active templates ordered by stage
- `createTemplate()` - Create new template
- `updateTemplate()` - Modify existing
- `deleteTemplate()` - Remove template

---

### 5. **ANALYTICS & REPORTING CAPABILITIES**

**Dashboard Metrics** (computed in-memory from opportunities):
- `totalCount` - All opportunities
- `bucketA`, `bucketB`, `bucketC` - Qualification distribution
- `activeValue` - Pipeline value for active stages
- `bamfamViolations` - Deals in discovery_done+ without scheduled next_meeting
- `responseRate` - (past cold_dm / total) * 100
- `meetingsBooked` - Count in booked+ stages
- `discoveryCalls` - Count in discovery_done+ stages
- `closeRate` - (closed_won / (closed_won + closed_lost)) * 100
- `avgDealSize` - Average value of won deals
- `avgCloseTime` - Days from created to closed for won deals
- `qualifiedPct` - (bucket A + B) / total * 100
- `bucketAPct` - Bucket A percentage
- `pipelineValue` - Active pipeline deal total
- `proposalsSent` - Count of proposals sent
- `meetingsThisWeek` - Scheduled meetings in next 7 days
- `meetingsToday` - Scheduled for today
- `staleDeals` - Active pipeline without contact in 7+ days
- `dealsAtRisk` - discovery_done+ stages with temperature < 40
- `totalRevenue` - Closed won value
- `weightedPipeline` - Deal value × stage probability

**Temperature Score** (calculated via RPC function):
- `calculate_temperature_score(opp_id)` - RPC function (calculation logic not visible in files)
- `recalculate_all_temperature_scores()` - RPC function for bulk update
- Auto-recalculated when: opportunity updated, activity created, bump recorded

**Stage History Analytics** (Available):
- `getStageHistory(objectType, objectId)` - Full audit trail
- Can calculate: conversion rates, velocity (time per stage), stage drop-off rates

---

### 6. **CRM TABLES STRUCTURE OVERVIEW**

| Table | Purpose | Key Relationships |
|-------|---------|-------------------|
| `crm_opportunities` | Main sales pipeline | FK: owner_id, affiliate_id, client_id |
| `crm_activities` | Activity timeline (in-progress) | FK: opportunity_id, owner_id |
| `crm_stage_history` | Audit trail | FK: changed_by |
| `crm_affiliates` | KOLs & referrers | FK: owner_id |
| `crm_partners` | BD relationships | FK: owner_id, affiliate_id |
| `crm_contacts` | Individual contacts | FK: owner_id |
| `crm_contact_links` | Contact mappings | FK: contact_id, opportunity_id, partner_id, affiliate_id |
| `sales_dm_templates` | Message templates | FK: created_by |

---

### 7. **KEY DATA FOR AI ANALYSIS**

**Per Opportunity, Available for AI Analysis**:
- Full pipeline journey (all stage changes via crm_stage_history)
- Engagement metrics (bump_number, last_contacted_at, temperature_score)
- Timeline data (discovery_call_at, proposal_sent_at, etc)
- Communication platforms (poc_platform, tg_handle)
- Deal metrics (deal_value, currency, source)
- Status tracking (bucket, orbit_reason, warm_sub_state)
- Meeting scheduling (next_meeting_at, next_meeting_type, calendly tracking)
- Activity history (once crm_activities fully implemented)
- Contacts linked to opportunity
- Associated affiliate/partner info

**Stage-Specific Auto-Tracked Data**:
- When moved to `discovery_done` → `discovery_call_at` timestamped
- When moved to `proposal_sent` → `proposal_sent_at` timestamped
- When closed → `closed_at` timestamped
- When bucket changed → `bucket_changed_at` timestamped
- Opportunity creation → `qualified_at` timestamped when deal-qualified

---

### 8. **CURRENT LIMITATIONS & GAPS**

**Not Yet Implemented**:
- `crm_activities` table is referenced in code but migration not applied
- `sales_dm_templates` table referenced but no migration found yet
- Temperature score calculation logic is a database RPC (implementation hidden)
- Full activity timeline display in UI not yet visible

**What Exists**:
- Stage history is immutable audit trail (perfect for timeline analysis)
- Opportunity timestamps capture key milestones
- Bump tracking is automated
- Dashboard metrics are computed client-side from opportunities
- RLS policies enforce access control

---

This data structure provides rich material for AI analysis of deal progression, bottlenecks, and timeline predictions!

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-13 18:33:05Z)**_

Here's my recommendation for implementing AI-powered sales pipeline analysis:

## Approach: Supabase Edge Function + Claude API

**Why this approach:**
- Keeps AI processing server-side (no API keys exposed to client)
- Can be called on-demand or scheduled
- Access to all CRM data directly via Supabase client
- Returns structured insights to the frontend

---

## Data You Already Have (it's rich)

| Source | What AI Can Analyze |
|--------|-------------------|
| `crm_activities` | Message content, outcomes, next steps, activity types, timing |
| `crm_stage_history` | Stage progression speed, where deals stall, drop-off points |
| `crm_opportunities` | Deal values, sources, bump counts, temperature scores, orbit reasons |
| `sales_dm_templates` | Which templates are used, template effectiveness by stage |
| Timestamps | `discovery_call_at`, `proposal_sent_at`, `closed_at`, `last_contacted_at` — full velocity data |

---

## Suggested Architecture

### 1. Edge Function: `/analyze-pipeline`
A single Supabase Edge Function that accepts an `analysis_type` parameter:

- **`opportunity_summary`** — Summarize a single opp's activity timeline (quick wins: next best action, risk flags)
- **`win_loss_patterns`** — Compare won vs lost deals: what messaging, cadence, and paths correlate with wins
- **`stage_bottlenecks`** — Where deals stall longest, conversion rates per stage
- **`messaging_effectiveness`** — Which DM templates/styles lead to replies vs silence
- **`rep_performance`** — Per-owner metrics: response rates, close rates, velocity
- **`pipeline_health`** — Overall snapshot: risk deals, stale deals, weighted forecast accuracy

### 2. Storage: `pipeline_insights` table
Cache AI-generated insights so you're not re-analyzing the same data repeatedly:
- `id`, `analysis_type`, `scope` (opp_id or 'global'), `insight` (JSONB), `created_at`, `expires_at`

### 3. Frontend: Insights panel in the pipeline page
- Per-opportunity: "AI Summary" button in the slide-over
- Global: "Pipeline Insights" tab alongside Overview/Actions/Outreach

---

## What Would Make This Most Effective

**Before building, I'd suggest two small data improvements:**

1. **Track which template was used per activity** — Add a `template_id` column to `crm_activities`. Right now the template content gets pasted into description but we lose the link. This lets AI correlate template → outcome.

2. **Tag activity outcomes** — A structured `outcome_type` enum (replied, no_reply, booked, objection, ghosted) on activities would let AI do quantitative analysis instead of parsing free text.

---

## Implementation Order

1. Add `template_id` to `crm_activities` + `pipeline_insights` table (migrations)
2. Build the Edge Function with Claude API for `opportunity_summary` first (smallest scope, most immediately useful)
3. Add "AI Summary" button to the slide-over — one click, instant context
4. Expand to `win_loss_patterns` and `messaging_effectiveness` (these need enough closed deals to be meaningful)
5. Add the global Pipeline Insights tab last

Want me to start on any of these steps, or would you like to adjust the approach first?

---

```md
# AI Pipeline Analysis — Implementation Plan

## Overview

AI-powered analysis of the sales pipeline activity timeline to surface insights on deal progression, messaging effectiveness, rep performance, and pipeline health. Uses Supabase Edge Functions + Claude API.

---

## Data Available for Analysis

| Source | Fields | What AI Can Analyze |
|--------|--------|-------------------|
| `crm_activities` | type, title, description, outcome, next_step, attachment_url, created_at | Message content, outcomes, activity cadence, follow-up patterns |
| `crm_stage_history` | from_stage, to_stage, changed_by, changed_at, notes | Stage velocity, where deals stall, drop-off points, conversion rates |
| `crm_opportunities` | stage, deal_value, source, bump_number, temperature_score, bucket, orbit_reason, closed_lost_reason, warm_sub_state, poc_platform, dm_account | Deal characteristics, engagement scoring, loss reasons |
| `sales_dm_templates` | stage, sub_type, content, variables | Template usage and effectiveness |
| Opportunity timestamps | discovery_call_at, proposal_sent_at, calendly_sent_date, calendly_booked_date, last_contacted_at, last_bump_date, closed_at, created_at | Full velocity data, time-in-stage, response latency |

---

## Pre-Requisite Data Improvements

### Migration 1: Add `template_id` to `crm_activities`

Track which DM template was used per activity so AI can correlate template → outcome.

\```sql
ALTER TABLE crm_activities ADD COLUMN template_id UUID REFERENCES sales_dm_templates(id);
\```

Update the activity creation flow in `openActivityLogPrompt` / `confirmActivityLog` to pass the selected template ID.

### Migration 2: Add `outcome_type` enum to `crm_activities`

Structured outcome tagging for quantitative analysis instead of free-text parsing.

\```sql
CREATE TYPE activity_outcome_type AS ENUM ('replied', 'no_reply', 'booked', 'objection', 'ghosted', 'completed', 'other');
ALTER TABLE crm_activities ADD COLUMN outcome_type activity_outcome_type;
\```

Add a quick-select for outcome type in the activity log popup.

### Migration 3: Create `pipeline_insights` cache table

\```sql
CREATE TABLE pipeline_insights (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  analysis_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  scope TEXT NOT NULL,              -- opportunity ID or 'global'
  insight JSONB NOT NULL,
  model TEXT,                       -- e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-6'
  tokens_used INTEGER,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);

CREATE INDEX idx_pipeline_insights_scope ON pipeline_insights(analysis_type, scope);
\```

---

## Edge Function: `analyze-pipeline`

Single Supabase Edge Function that accepts `analysis_type` and optional `opportunity_id`.

### Endpoint

\```
POST /functions/v1/analyze-pipeline
Authorization: Bearer <user-jwt>
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "analysis_type": "opportunity_summary",
  "opportunity_id": "uuid",     // required for opp-level analyses
  "force_refresh": false         // skip cache
}
\```

### Analysis Types

#### 1. `opportunity_summary` (per-opp)

**Input:** All activities, stage history, and opp metadata for a single opportunity.

**Output:**
\```json
{
  "summary": "3-sentence deal summary",
  "risk_level": "low | medium | high",
  "risk_factors": ["No contact in 12 days", "Stuck in discovery_done for 2 weeks"],
  "next_best_action": "Send a follow-up referencing their Q2 budget cycle",
  "days_in_pipeline": 34,
  "engagement_trend": "declining | stable | improving"
}
\```

#### 2. `win_loss_patterns` (global)

**Input:** All closed_won and closed_lost opportunities with their full activity + stage history.

**Output:**
\```json
{
  "winning_patterns": [
    "Deals that book a discovery call within 5 days of first DM close at 3x the rate",
    "Proposals sent within 48hrs of discovery have 70% close rate"
  ],
  "losing_patterns": [
    "Deals with 4+ bumps before warm rarely convert",
    "Orbit → re-engage has a 12% success rate"
  ],
  "avg_winning_timeline": { "cold_dm_to_warm": "3d", "warm_to_booked": "5d", "booked_to_closed": "18d" },
  "top_loss_reasons": [{ "reason": "no_budget", "count": 12 }, { "reason": "competitor", "count": 8 }]
}
\```

#### 3. `stage_bottlenecks` (global)

**Input:** Stage history for all opportunities, grouped by stage transitions.

**Output:**
\```json
{
  "bottlenecks": [
    { "stage": "discovery_done", "avg_days": 14, "median_days": 10, "drop_off_rate": 0.35 },
    { "stage": "warm", "avg_days": 7, "median_days": 4, "drop_off_rate": 0.45 }
  ],
  "conversion_funnel": { "cold_dm": 100, "warm": 42, "booked": 28, "discovery_done": 22, "proposal_call": 15, "v2_contract": 10, "v2_closed_won": 8 },
  "recommendations": ["Focus on warm→booked conversion — highest drop-off point"]
}
\```

#### 4. `messaging_effectiveness` (global)

**Input:** All message activities with template_id, outcome_type, and the opp's subsequent stage changes.

**Output:**
\```json
{
  "template_performance": [
    { "template_name": "Cold DM v2", "sent_count": 45, "reply_rate": 0.31, "book_rate": 0.12 },
    { "template_name": "Follow-up Nudge", "sent_count": 30, "reply_rate": 0.20, "book_rate": 0.07 }
  ],
  "best_performing_openers": ["Templates mentioning specific project metrics get 2x replies"],
  "optimal_follow_up_cadence": "3 days between bumps yields best response rate",
  "platform_effectiveness": { "twitter": { "reply_rate": 0.35 }, "telegram": { "reply_rate": 0.28 } }
}
\```

#### 5. `rep_performance` (global)

**Input:** Opportunities and activities grouped by owner_id.

**Output:**
\```json
{
  "reps": [
    {
      "owner_id": "uuid",
      "name": "Rep Name",
      "deals_closed": 5,
      "close_rate": 0.22,
      "avg_deal_size": 15000,
      "avg_close_time_days": 24,
      "response_rate": 0.38,
      "strengths": ["Fast follow-up cadence", "High discovery→proposal conversion"],
      "areas_to_improve": ["Warm leads going stale — avg 8 days without contact"]
    }
  ]
}
\```

#### 6. `pipeline_health` (global)

**Input:** All active opportunities with current metrics.

**Output:**
\```json
{
  "total_pipeline_value": 250000,
  "weighted_pipeline_value": 85000,
  "forecast_accuracy_note": "Based on stage probabilities",
  "at_risk_deals": [{ "name": "Opp X", "reason": "No activity in 14 days, temperature dropping" }],
  "stale_deals_count": 5,
  "health_score": 72,
  "top_recommendations": [
    "5 deals in warm have not been contacted in 7+ days",
    "3 proposals outstanding for 10+ days — follow up or close out"
  ]
}
\```

---

## Edge Function Implementation Skeleton

\```typescript
import "jsr:@supabase/functions-js/edge-runtime.d.ts";
import { createClient } from "jsr:@supabase/supabase-js@2";
import Anthropic from "npm:@anthropic-ai/sdk";

Deno.serve(async (req: Request) => {
  const supabase = createClient(
    Deno.env.get("SUPABASE_URL")!,
    Deno.env.get("SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY")!
  );

  const { analysis_type, opportunity_id, force_refresh } = await req.json();

  // 1. Check cache (skip if force_refresh)
  if (!force_refresh) {
    const scope = opportunity_id || "global";
    const { data: cached } = await supabase
      .from("pipeline_insights")
      .select("insight")
      .eq("analysis_type", analysis_type)
      .eq("scope", scope)
      .gt("expires_at", new Date().toISOString())
      .order("created_at", { ascending: false })
      .limit(1)
      .single();
    if (cached) return Response.json(cached.insight);
  }

  // 2. Fetch relevant data based on analysis_type
  const context = await gatherContext(supabase, analysis_type, opportunity_id);

  // 3. Call Claude API
  const anthropic = new Anthropic({ apiKey: Deno.env.get("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY") });
  const systemPrompt = getSystemPrompt(analysis_type);
  const response = await anthropic.messages.create({
    model: "claude-sonnet-4-6",
    max_tokens: 2000,
    system: systemPrompt,
    messages: [{ role: "user", content: JSON.stringify(context) }],
  });

  const insight = JSON.parse(response.content[0].text);

  // 4. Cache result
  await supabase.from("pipeline_insights").insert({
    analysis_type,
    scope: opportunity_id || "global",
    insight,
    model: "claude-sonnet-4-6",
    tokens_used: response.usage.input_tokens + response.usage.output_tokens,
    expires_at: new Date(Date.now() + 1000 * 60 * 60 * (analysis_type.includes("summary") ? 1 : 24)).toISOString(),
  });

  return Response.json(insight);
});
\```

---

## Frontend Integration

### Per-Opportunity: "AI Summary" in Slide-Over

Add a button in the slide-over header area:

\```
[✨ AI Summary]  →  loading spinner  →  inline card with summary, risk, next action
\```

- Call: `POST /functions/v1/analyze-pipeline { analysis_type: "opportunity_summary", opportunity_id }`
- Display inline in the slide-over, above the activity timeline
- Cache for 1 hour per opp

### Global: "Insights" Tab in Pipeline Page

New tab alongside Overview / Actions / Outreach / Orbit / Templates:

\```
Overview | Actions | Outreach | Orbit | Templates | Insights
\```

Sections:
1. **Pipeline Health** — health score gauge, at-risk deals, recommendations
2. **Stage Funnel** — visual conversion funnel with bottleneck highlights
3. **Win/Loss Patterns** — key findings with supporting data
4. **Messaging** — template leaderboard, cadence insights
5. **Rep Performance** — per-rep cards with strengths/improvements

Each section loads independently with its own loading state. Global insights cache for 24 hours.

---

## Implementation Order

| Step | What | Scope |
|------|------|-------|
| 1 | Migrations: `template_id`, `outcome_type` on activities, `pipeline_insights` table | Database |
| 2 | Update activity log popup: pass template_id on save, add outcome_type quick-select | `sales-pipeline/page.tsx` |
| 3 | Edge Function: `opportunity_summary` analysis type only | Edge Function |
| 4 | "AI Summary" button in slide-over | `sales-pipeline/page.tsx` |
| 5 | Edge Function: remaining analysis types (`win_loss_patterns`, `stage_bottlenecks`, `messaging_effectiveness`, `rep_performance`, `pipeline_health`) | Edge Function |
| 6 | "Insights" tab with all global sections | `sales-pipeline/page.tsx` |

---

## Cost Estimation

- **Per-opp summary**: ~1K input tokens, ~500 output → ~$0.005/call
- **Global analyses**: ~10-50K input tokens depending on deal count → ~$0.05-0.25/call
- **With 24hr caching on global + 1hr on per-opp**: Minimal daily cost for a team of 5-10

---

## Environment Variables Needed

\```
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...
\```

Add to Supabase Edge Function secrets via dashboard or CLI.

    86→  const { setNodeRef, isOver } = useDroppable({ id });
    87→  return (
    88→    <div ref={setNodeRef} className={`${className} ${isOver ? 'ring-2 ring-blue-400 ring-offset-2' : ''}`}>
    89→      {children}
    90→    </div>
    91→  );
    92→}
    93→

    95→  const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({ id });
    96→  const style = {
    97→    transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),
    98→    transition,
    99→    opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
   100→  };

   100→  };

   107→
   108→function SortableTableRow({ id, children, className, onClick }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode; className?: string; onClick?: () => void }) {
   109→  const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({ id });
   110→  const style: React.CSSProperties = {
   111→    transform: CSS.Translate.toString(transform),
   112→    transition,
   113→    opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
   114→    position: 'relative' as const,
   115→    zIndex: isDragging ? 1 : 0,
   116→  };
   117→  return (
   118→    <TableRow ref={setNodeRef} style={style} className={`${className || ''} ${isDragging ? 'bg-blue-50 shadow-lg' : ''}`} onClick={onClick}>
   119→      <TableCell className="w-10">
   120→        <div
   121→          {...attributes}
   122→          {...listeners}
   123→          className="cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded"
   124→          onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
   125→        >
   126→          <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   127→        </div>
   128→      </TableCell>
   129→      {children}
   130→    </TableRow>
   131→  );
   132→}
   133→

  1676→  const renderKanban = () => (
  1677→    <DndContext sensors={sensors} collisionDetection={closestCenter} onDragStart={handleDragStart} onDragEnd={handleDragEnd}>
  1678→      <div className="flex gap-4 overflow-x-auto pb-4 h-full">
  1679→        {visiblePipelineStages.map(stage => {
  1680→          const stageOpps = getStageOpps(stage);
  1681→          const colors = STAGE_COLORS[stage];
  1682→          const isCollapsed = collapsedKanbanStages.has(stage);
  1683→          const stageValue = stageOpps.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
  1684→
  1685→          return (
  1686→            <div
  1687→              key={stage}
  1688→              className={`${isCollapsed ? 'w-12' : 'flex-1 min-w-[280px] max-w-[320px]'} flex flex-col h-full transition-all duration-200`}
  1689→            >
  1690→              {/* Column Header */}
  1691→              <div
  1692→                className={`${isCollapsed ? 'rounded-lg' : 'rounded-t-lg'} px-4 py-3 ${colors.bg} border ${colors.border} ${isCollapsed ? '' : 'border-b-0'} flex-shrink-0 cursor-pointer select-none`}
  1693→                onClick={() => toggleKanbanCollapse(stage)}
  1694→              >
  1695→                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
  1696→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1697→                    {isCollapsed ? (
  1698→                      <ChevronRight className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
  1699→                    ) : (
  1700→                      <ChevronDown className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
  1701→                    )}
  1702→                    {!isCollapsed && (
  1703→                      <>
  1704→                        <h4 className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`}>{STAGE_LABELS[stage]}</h4>
  1705→                        <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">{stageOpps.length}</Badge>
  1706→                      </>
  1707→                    )}
  1708→                  </div>
  1709→                </div>
  1710→                {!isCollapsed && stageValue > 0 && (
  1711→                  <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600 mt-1">
  1712→                    ${stageValue.toLocaleString()}
  1713→                  </p>
  1714→                )}
  1715→                {isCollapsed && (
  1716→                  <div className="mt-2 flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
  1717→                    <span className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`} style={{ writingMode: 'vertical-rl', textOrientation: 'mixed' }}>
  1718→                      {STAGE_LABELS[stage]}
  1719→                    </span>
  1720→                    <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium mt-1">{stageOpps.length}</Badge>
  1721→                  </div>
  1722→                )}
  1723→              </div>
  1724→
  1725→              {/* Column Content - Droppable Area */}
  1726→              {!isCollapsed && (
  1727→                <DroppableColumn id={stage} className={`flex-1 bg-gray-50/50 border border-gray-200 border-t-0 rounded-b-lg p-3 space-y-3 overflow-y-auto transition-colors`}>
  1728→                  <SortableContext items={stageOpps.map(o => o.id)} strategy={verticalListSortingStrategy}>
  1729→                    {stageOpps.length === 0 ? (
  1730→                      <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-24 text-sm text-gray-400">
  1731→                        No opportunities
  1732→                      </div>
  1733→                    ) : (
  1734→                      stageOpps.map(opp => (
  1735→                        <SortableCard key={opp.id} id={opp.id}>
  1736→                          {renderCard(opp)}
  1737→                        </SortableCard>
  1738→                      ))
  1739→                    )}
  1740→                  </SortableContext>
  1741→                </DroppableColumn>
  1742→              )}
  1743→            </div>
  1744→          );
  1745→        })}
  1746→
  1747→        {/* Orbit drop zone */}
  1748→        <div className="w-12 flex flex-col h-full transition-all duration-200">
  1749→          <DroppableColumn id="orbit" className="rounded-lg px-4 py-3 bg-orange-50 border border-orange-200 flex-shrink-0 cursor-pointer select-none">
  1750→            <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
  1751→              <RotateCcw className="w-4 h-4 text-orange-700" />
  1752→              <span className="font-semibold text-orange-700 mt-2" style={{ writingMode: 'vertical-rl', textOrientation: 'mixed' }}>
  1753→                Orbit
  1754→              </span>
  1755→              <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium mt-1">{orbitOpps.length}</Badge>
  1756→            </div>
  1757→          </DroppableColumn>
  1758→        </div>
  1759→
  1760→        {/* Closed Lost drop zone */}
  1761→        <div className="w-12 flex flex-col h-full transition-all duration-200">
  1762→          <DroppableColumn id="v2_closed_lost" className="rounded-lg px-4 py-3 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 flex-shrink-0 cursor-pointer select-none">
  1763→            <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
  1764→              <X className="w-4 h-4 text-red-700" />
  1765→              <span className="font-semibold text-red-700 mt-2" style={{ writingMode: 'vertical-rl', textOrientation: 'mixed' }}>
  1766→                Lost
  1767→              </span>
  1768→              <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium mt-1">
  1769→                {filteredOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === 'v2_closed_lost').length}
  1770→              </Badge>
  1771→            </div>
  1772→          </DroppableColumn>
  1773→        </div>
  1774→      </div>
  1775→
  1776→      <DragOverlay>
  1777→        {activeOpportunity ? (
  1778→          <div className="w-[280px]">
  1779→            {renderCard(activeOpportunity, true)}
  1780→          </div>
  1781→        ) : null}
  1782→      </DragOverlay>
  1783→    </DndContext>
  1784→  );
  1785→
  1786→  // ============================================
  1787→  // RENDER: Table View
  1788→  // ============================================
  1789→
  1790→  const renderTable = () => (
  1791→    <div className="pb-8">
  1792→      <DndContext sensors={sensors} collisionDetection={closestCenter} onDragStart={handleDragStart} onDragEnd={handleDragEnd}>
  1793→        {visiblePipelineStages.map(stage => {
  1794→          const stageOpps = getStageOpps(stage);
  1795→          const colors = STAGE_COLORS[stage];
  1796→          const isCollapsed = collapsedStages.has(stage);
  1797→          const stageValue = stageOpps.reduce((s, o) => s + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
  1798→
  1799→          return (
  1800→            <div key={stage} className="mb-6">
  1801→              {/* Stage Header */}
  1802→              <div
  1803→                onClick={() => {
  1804→                  const next = new Set(collapsedStages);
  1805→                  isCollapsed ? next.delete(stage) : next.add(stage);
  1806→                  setCollapsedStages(next);
  1807→                }}
  1808→                className={`flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 ${colors.bg} ${isCollapsed ? 'rounded-lg' : 'rounded-t-lg'} border ${colors.border} ${isCollapsed ? '' : 'border-b-0'} cursor-pointer select-none transition-all`}
  1809→              >
  1810→                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1811→                  {isCollapsed ? <ChevronRight className={`h-4 w-4 ${colors.text}`} /> : <ChevronDown className={`h-4 w-4 ${colors.text}`} />}
  1812→                  <h4 className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`}>{STAGE_LABELS[stage]}</h4>
  1813→                  <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">{stageOpps.length}</Badge>
  1814→                </div>
  1815→                {stageValue > 0 && (
  1816→                  <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">
  1817→                    ${stageValue.toLocaleString()}
  1818→                  </span>
  1819→                )}
  1820→              </div>
  1821→
  1822→              {!isCollapsed && (
  1823→                <div className="bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0">
  1824→                  <Table>
  1825→                    <TableHeader>
  1826→                      <TableRow className="bg-gray-50/50">
  1827→                        <TableHead className="w-10"></TableHead>
  1828→                        <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
  1829→                        <TableHead className="w-[70px]">Bucket</TableHead>
  1830→                        <TableHead className="w-[70px]">Path</TableHead>
  1831→                        <TableHead className="w-[90px]">Temp</TableHead>
  1832→                        <TableHead className="w-[110px]">Value</TableHead>
  1833→                        <TableHead className="w-[100px]">Owner</TableHead>
  1834→                        <TableHead className="w-[100px]">TG Handle</TableHead>
  1835→                        {stage === 'cold_dm' && <TableHead className="w-[80px]">Bumps</TableHead>}
  1836→                        {stage === 'warm' && <TableHead className="w-[90px]">Type</TableHead>}
  1837→                        <TableHead className="w-[70px]">BAMFAM</TableHead>
  1838→                        <TableHead className="w-[50px]"></TableHead>
  1839→                      </TableRow>
  1840→                    </TableHeader>
  1841→                    <TableBody>
  1842→                      <SortableContext items={stageOpps.map(o => o.id)} strategy={verticalListSortingStrategy}>
  1843→                        {stageOpps.length === 0 ? (
  1844→                          <TableRow>
  1845→                            <TableCell colSpan={11} className="text-center text-sm text-gray-400 py-8">
  1846→                              No opportunities in this stage
  1847→                            </TableCell>
  1848→                          </TableRow>
  1849→                        ) : stageOpps.map(opp => (
  1850→                          <SortableTableRow
  1851→                            key={opp.id}
  1852→                            id={opp.id}
  1853→                            className="group hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer"
  1854→                            onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}
  1855→                          >
  1856→                              <TableCell>
  1857→                                {editingCell?.id === opp.id && editingCell.field === 'name' ? (
  1858→                                  <Input
  1859→                                    value={editingValue}
  1860→                                    onChange={e => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
  1861→                                    onBlur={() => handleInlineEdit(opp.id, 'name', editingValue)}
  1862→                                    onKeyDown={e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') handleInlineEdit(opp.id, 'name', editingValue); if (e.key === 'Escape') setEditingCell(null); }}
  1863→                                    className="h-8 text-sm font-medium auth-input"
  1864→                                    autoFocus
  1865→                                    onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
  1866→                                  />
  1867→                                ) : (
  1868→                                  <div
  1869→                                    onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); setEditingCell({ id: opp.id, field: 'name' }); setEditingValue(opp.name); }}
  1870→                                    className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-100 rounded px-2 py-1 -mx-2 -my-1"
  1871→                                  >
  1872→                                    <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  1873→                                    <span className="font-medium">{opp.name}</span>
  1874→                                  </div>
  1875→                                )}
  1876→                              </TableCell>
  1877→                              <TableCell>
  1878→                                {opp.bucket && (
  1879→                                  <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text}`}>
  1880→                                    {opp.bucket}
  1881→                                  </span>
  1882→                                )}
  1883→                              </TableCell>
  1884→                              <TableCell>
  1885→                                <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
  1886→                                  {opp.dm_account === 'closer' ? 'C' : opp.dm_account === 'sdr' ? 'S' : 'O'}
  1887→                                </Badge>
  1888→                              </TableCell>
  1889→                              <TableCell>
  1890→                                <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  1891→                                  <div className="w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
  1892→                                    <div
  1893→                                      className={`h-full rounded-full ${opp.temperature_score >= 70 ? 'bg-green-500' : opp.temperature_score >= 40 ? 'bg-amber-500' : 'bg-red-400'}`}
  1894→                                      style={{ width: `${opp.temperature_score}%` }}
  1895→                                    />
  1896→                                  </div>
  1897→                                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{opp.temperature_score}</span>
  1898→                                </div>
  1899→                              </TableCell>
```

  4859→          onClick={() => setShowDashboard(!showDashboard)}
  4860→        >
  4861→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  4862→            <BarChart3 className="h-4 w-4 text-[#3e8692]" />
  4863→            <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">Sales Dashboard</span>
  4864→            <TooltipProvider delayDuration={200}>
  4865→              <Tooltip>
  4866→                <TooltipTrigger asChild>
  4867→                  <Button
  4868→                    variant="ghost"
  4869→                    size="sm"
```
</details></tool-use>

  5007→                      </p>

  5020→                    <tr className="bg-gray-50/80">
  5021→                      <th className="text-left py-2 px-3 font-medium text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider text-[10px]">Stage</th>
  5022→                      <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-medium text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider text-[10px]">In</th>
  5023→                      <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-medium text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider text-[10px]">Out</th>
  5024→                      <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-medium text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider text-[10px]">Conv.</th>
  5025→                      <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-medium text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider text-[10px]">Drop</th>
  5026→                      <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-medium text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider text-[10px]">Avg Days</th>
  5027→                      <th className="py-2 px-3 w-[100px]"></th>
  5028→                    </tr>
  5029→                  </thead>

  5031→                    {dashboardMetrics.stageConversions.map((conv, i) => {
  5032→                      const timeData = dashboardMetrics.avgDaysInStage[i];

  5034→                      const isSlowest = dashboardMetrics.slowestStage?.stage === conv.stage;
  5035→                      const barWidth = Math.max(conv.rate, 3);
  5036→                      const barColor = conv.rate >= 60 ? 'bg-emerald-400' : conv.rate >= 30 ? 'bg-amber-400' : 'bg-red-400';
  5037→                      return (
  5038→                        <tr key={conv.stage} className={`border-t border-gray-100 ${isWorst ? 'bg-red-50/40' : isSlowest ? 'bg-amber-50/30' : ''}`}>
  5039→                          <td className="py-1.5 px-3 font-medium text-gray-700">
  5040→                            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  5041→                              {STAGE_LABELS[conv.stage as SalesPipelineStage]}
  5042→                              {isWorst && <span className="inline-block w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-red-400" />}
  5043→                              {isSlowest && <span className="inline-block w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-amber-400" />}
  5044→                            </div>
  5045→                          </td>
  5046→                          <td className="py-1.5 px-3 text-center text-gray-500">{conv.from}</td>
  5047→                          <td className="py-1.5 px-3 text-center text-gray-500">{conv.to}</td>
  5048→                          <td className="py-1.5 px-3 text-center">
  5049→                            <span className={`font-semibold ${conv.rate >= 60 ? 'text-emerald-600' : conv.rate >= 30 ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-red-500'}`}>
  5050→                              {conv.from > 0 ? `${conv.rate.toFixed(0)}%` : '—'}
  5051→                            </span>
  5052→                          </td>
  5053→                          <td className="py-1.5 px-3 text-center">
  5054→                            {conv.dropoff > 0 ? (
  5055→                              <span className="text-red-400 font-medium">-{conv.dropoff}</span>
  5056→                            ) : (
  5057→                              <span className="text-gray-300">0</span>
  5058→                            )}
  5059→                          </td>
  5060→                          <td className="py-1.5 px-3 text-center">
  5061→                            {timeData.count > 0 ? (
  5062→                              <span className={`font-medium ${timeData.avgDays >= 14 ? 'text-red-500' : timeData.avgDays >= 7 ? 'text-amber-500' : 'text-gray-500'}`}>
  5063→                                {timeData.avgDays}d
  5064→                              </span>
  5065→                            ) : (
  5066→                              <span className="text-gray-300">—</span>
  5067→                            )}
  5068→                          </td>
  5069→                          <td className="py-1.5 px-3">
  5070→                            <div className="w-full h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
  5071→                              <div className={`h-full rounded-full ${barColor}`} style={{ width: `${barWidth}%` }} />
  5072→                            </div>
  5073→                          </td>
  5074→                        </tr>
  5075→                      );
  5076→                    })}
  5077→                  </tbody>
  5078→                </table>
  5079→              </div>
  5080→            </div>
  5081→
  5082→            {/* Divider */}
  5083→            <div className="border-t border-gray-100" />
  5084→
  5085→            {/* Row 4: Bucket Breakdown */}
  5086→            <div>
  5087→              <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-3">Bucket Breakdown</p>
  5088→              <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
  5089→                {[
  5090→                  { label: 'Bucket A', sub: 'High-value, high-intent', value: metrics.bucketA, accent: 'border-l-emerald-400', color: 'text-emerald-700' },
  5091→                  { label: 'Bucket B', sub: 'Standard follow-up', value: metrics.bucketB, accent: 'border-l-amber-400', color: 'text-amber-700' },
  5092→                  { label: 'Bucket C', sub: 'Lower priority', value: metrics.bucketC, accent: 'border-l-gray-300', color: 'text-gray-600' },
  5093→                ].map(item => (
  5094→                  <div key={item.label} className={`border-l-[3px] ${item.accent} bg-white rounded-r-lg px-3 py-2.5 flex items-center justify-between`}>
  5095→                    <div>
  5096→                      <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-700">{item.label}</p>
  5097→                      <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">{item.sub}</p>
  5098→                    </div>
  5099→                    <p className={`text-xl font-bold ${item.color}`}>{item.value}</p>
  5100→                  </div>
  5101→                ))}
  5102→              </div>
  5103→            </div>
  5104→          </CardContent>
  5105→        )}
  5106→      </Card>
  5107→
  5108→      {/* Tabs + Controls */}
  5109→      <Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={v => setActiveTab(v as 'actions' | 'outreach' | 'pipeline' | 'orbit' | 'overview' | 'templates')}>
  5110→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4 flex-shrink-0">
  5111→          <TabsList>
  5112→            <TabsTrigger value="overview" className="flex items-center gap-2">
  5113→              <LayoutGrid className="h-4 w-4" />
  5114→              Overall
  5115→              <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-1">
  5116→                {opportunities.filter(o => !['v2_closed_won', 'v2_closed_lost'].includes(o.stage)).length}
  5117→              </Badge>
  5118→            </TabsTrigger>
  5119→            <TabsTrigger value="actions" className="flex items-center gap-2">
  5120→              <Zap className="h-4 w-4" />
  5121→              Actions
  5122→              {allActionItems.length > 0 && (
  5123→                <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-1">{allActionItems.length}</Badge>
  5124→              )}
  5125→            </TabsTrigger>

  5127→              <MessageSquare className="h-4 w-4" />
  5128→              Outreach
  5129→              {outreachAllTotal > 0 && (
  5130→                <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-1">{outreachAllTotal}</Badge>
  5131→              )}
  5132→            </TabsTrigger>
  5133→            <TabsTrigger value="pipeline" className="flex items-center gap-2">
  5134→              <Target className="h-4 w-4" />
  5135→              Pipeline
  5136→              {(() => {
  5137→                const pipelineCount = opportunities.filter(o =>
  5138→                  PIPELINE_STAGES.includes(o.stage as SalesPipelineStage) && o.stage !== 'cold_dm'
  5139→                ).length;
  5140→                return pipelineCount > 0 ? <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-1">{pipelineCount}</Badge> : null;
  5141→              })()}
  5142→            </TabsTrigger>
  5143→            <TabsTrigger value="orbit" className="flex items-center gap-2">
  5144→              <RotateCcw className="h-4 w-4" />
  5145→              Orbit
  5146→              {orbitOpps.length > 0 && (
  5147→                <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-1">{orbitOpps.length}</Badge>
  5148→              )}
  5149→            </TabsTrigger>

  5257→                className="w-full flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 bg-amber-50 hover:bg-amber-100 transition-colors"
  5258→              >

  5265→              </button>

  5274→
  5275→        <TabsContent value="templates" className="mt-0">
  5276→          {(() => {
  5277→            const TEMPLATE_STAGES = [
  5278→              { value: 'all', label: 'All' },
  5279→              { value: 'cold_dm', label: 'Cold DM' },
  5280→              { value: 'warm', label: 'Warm' },
  5281→              { value: 'tg_intro', label: 'TG Intro' },
  5282→              { value: 'booked', label: 'Booked' },
  5283→              { value: 'discovery_done', label: 'Discovery Done' },
  5284→              { value: 'proposal_call', label: 'Proposal Call' },
  5285→              { value: 'v2_contract', label: 'Contract' },
  5286→              { value: 'bump', label: 'Bumps' },
  5287→            ];
  5288→
  5289→            const filteredTemplates = templateStageFilter === 'all'
  5290→              ? templates
  5291→              : templates.filter(t => t.stage === templateStageFilter);
  5292→
  5293→            const getSubTypeLabel = (subType: string) => {
  5294→              const labels: Record<string, string> = {
  5295→                general: 'General',
  5296→                initial: 'Initial',
  5297→                bump_1: 'Bump 1',
  5298→                bump_2: 'Bump 2',
  5299→                bump_3: 'Bump 3',
  5300→                follow_up: 'Follow-up',
  5301→              };
  5302→              return labels[subType] || subType;
  5303→            };
  5304→
  5305→            const getStageLabelForTemplate = (stage: string) => {
  5306→              if (stage === 'bump') return 'Bump';
  5307→              return (STAGE_LABELS as Record<string, string>)[stage] || stage;
  5308→            };
  5309→
  5310→            const getStageColorForTemplate = (stage: string) => {
  5311→              if (stage === 'bump') return { bg: 'bg-pink-50', text: 'text-pink-700' };
  5312→              const colors = (STAGE_COLORS as Record<string, { bg: string; text: string }>)[stage];
  5313→              return colors || { bg: 'bg-gray-50', text: 'text-gray-700' };
  5314→            };
  5315→
  5316→            const handleCopy = async (content: string) => {
  5317→              await navigator.clipboard.writeText(content);
  5318→            };
  5319→
  5320→            const handleCreateTemplate = async () => {
  5321→              setIsTemplateSubmitting(true);
  5322→              try {
  5323→                const created = await SalesPipelineService.createTemplate(templateForm);
  5324→                setTemplates(prev => [...prev, created]);
  5325→                setIsTemplateDialogOpen(false);
  5326→                setTemplateForm({ name: '', stage: 'cold_dm', sub_type: 'general', content: '' });
  5327→              } catch (err) {
  5328→                console.error('Error creating template:', err);
  5329→              } finally {
  5330→                setIsTemplateSubmitting(false);
  5331→              }
  5332→            };
  5333→
  5334→            const handleUpdateTemplate = async () => {
  5335→              if (!editingTemplate) return;
  5336→              setIsTemplateSubmitting(true);
  5337→              try {
  5338→                const updated = await SalesPipelineService.updateTemplate(editingTemplate.id, templateForm);
  5339→                setTemplates(prev => prev.map(t => t.id === updated.id ? updated : t));
  5340→                setEditingTemplate(null);
  5341→                setIsTemplateDialogOpen(false);
  5342→                setTemplateForm({ name: '', stage: 'cold_dm', sub_type: 'general', content: '' });
  5343→              } catch (err) {
  5344→                console.error('Error updating template:', err);
  5345→              } finally {
  5346→                setIsTemplateSubmitting(false);
  5347→              }
  5348→            };
```
</details></tool-use>

  2440→  // ============================================
  2441→
  2442→  const renderActionsTab = () => {
  2443→    const getPriorityIcon = (priority: ActionPriority) => {
  2444→      switch (priority) {
  2445→        case 'urgent': return <AlertTriangle className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-red-500" />;
  2446→        case 'high': return <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-amber-500" />;
  2447→        case 'medium': return <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-blue-500" />;
  2448→        case 'low': return <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-400" />;
  2449→        default: return null;
  2450→      }
  2451→    };
  2452→
  2453→    const getButtonVariant = (priority: ActionPriority): 'destructive' | 'default' | 'outline' => {
  2454→      if (priority === 'urgent') return 'destructive';
  2455→      if (priority === 'high') return 'default';
  2456→      return 'outline';
  2457→    };
  2458→
  2459→    const getTimingInfo = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity): { text: string; color: string } => {
  2460→      const daysAgo = (date: string | null) => {
  2461→        if (!date) return null;
  2462→        return Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(date).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  2463→      };
  2464→      const daysUntil = (date: string | null) => {
  2465→        if (!date) return null;
  2466→        return Math.ceil((new Date(date).getTime() - Date.now()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  2467→      };
  2468→
  2469→      // Cold DM — show last bump timing
  2470→      if (opp.stage === 'cold_dm') {
  2471→        if (opp.bump_number === 0) return { text: 'Not bumped', color: 'text-gray-500' };
  2472→        const d = daysAgo(opp.last_bump_date);
  2473→        if (d === null) return { text: `${opp.bump_number}/4 bumps`, color: 'text-gray-500' };
  2474→        return {
  2475→          text: `Bumped ${d}d ago`,
  2476→          color: d >= 3 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500',
  2477→        };
  2478→      }
  2479→
  2480→      // Stages with next_meeting — show meeting timing
  2481→      if (opp.next_meeting_at) {
  2482→        const d = daysUntil(opp.next_meeting_at);
  2483→        if (d !== null) {
  2484→          if (d < 0) return { text: `Meeting ${Math.abs(d)}d ago`, color: 'text-red-500 font-medium' };
  2485→          if (d === 0) return { text: 'Meeting today', color: 'text-blue-600 font-medium' };
  2486→          return { text: `Meeting in ${d}d`, color: d <= 2 ? 'text-blue-600 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500' };
  2487→        }
  2488→      }
  2489→
  2490→      // Proposal sent — show how long ago
  2491→      if (opp.stage === 'proposal_call' || (opp.stage === 'discovery_done' && opp.proposal_sent_at)) {
  2492→        const d = daysAgo(opp.proposal_sent_at);
  2493→        if (d !== null) return {
  2494→          text: `Sent ${d}d ago`,
  2495→          color: d >= 5 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500',
  2496→        };
  2497→      }
  2498→
  2499→      // Orbit — show time in orbit
  2500→      if (opp.stage === 'orbit') {
  2501→        const d = daysAgo(opp.updated_at);
  2502→        if (d !== null) return { text: `${d}d in orbit`, color: d > 90 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500' };
  2503→      }
  2504→
  2505→      // Default — days since last contact
  2506→      const lastDate = opp.last_contacted_at || opp.last_bump_date || opp.created_at;
  2507→      const d = daysAgo(lastDate);
  2508→      if (d === null) return { text: '—', color: 'text-gray-400' };
  2509→      return {
  2510→        text: `${d}d silent`,
  2511→        color: d >= 7 ? 'text-red-500 font-medium' : d >= 3 ? 'text-amber-500' : 'text-gray-500',
  2512→      };
  2513→    };
  2514→
  2515→    const currentItems = displayedActions;
  2516→    const emptyLabel = alertCardFilter !== 'none' ? 'No matching opportunities found' :
  2517→      actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' ? 'No outreach actions needed' :
  2518→      actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' ? 'No closing actions needed' :
  2519→      actionPhaseFilter === 'orbit' ? 'No orbit actions needed' :
  2520→      actionPhaseFilter === 'non_urgent' ? 'No opportunities in waiting state' :
  2521→      'No actions needed right now';
  2522→
  2523→    return (
  2524→      <div className="pb-8">
  2525→        {/* Top row: Owner filter + Phase tabs */}
  2526→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
  2527→          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  2528→            {([
  2529→              { key: 'all' as const, label: 'All Actions' },
  2530→              { key: 'mine' as const, label: 'My Actions' },
  2531→              { key: 'urgent' as const, label: 'Urgent Only' },
  2532→            ]).map(f => (
  2533→              <button
  2534→                key={f.key}
  2535→                onClick={() => { setActionFilter(f.key); setAlertCardFilter('none'); }}
  2536→                className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors ${
  2537→                  actionFilter === f.key
  2538→                    ? 'bg-sky-100 text-sky-700 border border-sky-200'
  2539→                    : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 border border-transparent'
  2540→                }`}
  2541→              >
  2542→                {f.label}
  2543→              </button>
  2544→            ))}
  2545→          </div>
  2546→          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg p-0.5">
  2547→            {([
  2548→              { key: 'all' as const, label: 'All', count: allActionItems.length },
  2549→              { key: 'outreach' as const, label: 'Outreach', count: allOutreachCount },
  2550→              { key: 'closing' as const, label: 'Closing', count: allClosingCount },
  2551→              { key: 'orbit' as const, label: 'Orbit', count: allOrbitCount },
  2552→              { key: 'non_urgent' as const, label: 'Waiting', count: allNonUrgentCount },
  2553→            ]).map(p => (
  2554→              <button
  2555→                key={p.key}
  2556→                onClick={() => { setActionPhaseFilter(p.key); setAlertCardFilter('none'); }}
  2557→                className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors ${
  2558→                  actionPhaseFilter === p.key
  2559→                    ? 'bg-white text-gray-900 shadow-sm'
  2560→                    : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'
  2561→                }`}
  2562→              >
  2563→                {p.key === 'outreach' && <Send className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2564→                {p.key === 'closing' && <Target className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2565→                {p.key === 'orbit' && <RotateCcw className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2566→                {p.key === 'all' && <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2567→                {p.key === 'non_urgent' && <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2568→                {p.label}
  2569→                <span className={`ml-0.5 text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0 rounded-full ${
